title: Controlling $\langle \hat{S}^2 \rangle$ in Broken-symmetry Density Functional Theory Calculations via Constrained Optimization
summary: Accurate determination of magnetic exchange coupling constants ($J$) from density functional theory (DFT) remains challenging, particularly for open-shell systems where broken-symmetry (BS) solutions suffer from spurious spin contamination that systematically exaggerates $J$ values. Several methods have been proposed to address this problem by adjusting the mapping scheme from the DFT energies to the Heisenberg-Dirac-van Vleck effective spin Hamiltonian energies. In this work, we explore a different route by imposing a constraint to the DFT energy that enforces a target value of the spin-squared expectation, $\langle \hat{S}^2 \rangle$, using a Lagrange multiplier approach. By explicitly controlling the spin character of the electronic state, the method attempts to overcome limitations of standard BS calculations to describe magnetic interactions. As part of the theoretical formulation, we derive analytical expressions for the gradient of the spin-squared expectation value with respect to the spin-resolved density matrices, which are required for the practical implementation of the constraint within a generalized Kohn-Sham scheme. These expressions are general to any single-determinant method and remain valid for arbitrary spin states. We apply the spin-constrained approach to the calculation of $J$ couplings and compare with three energy-difference-based schemes for a set of representative systems, including H$_2$He, H$_3$He$_3$ arranged in an equilateral triangle, and a bis($μ$-hydroxo) Cu(II) complex. Across all cases, the constrained formulation yields systematically lower and more consistent exchange couplings across different density functional approximations. This work establishes a robust and general route for incorporating spin-state constraints into DFT-based studies of magnetic exchange interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拉格朗日乘子法的自旋约束DFT方法，通过强制目标$\langle \hat{S}^2 \rangle$值来克服传统破缺对称性方案中自旋污染导致的磁交换耦合常数$J$高估问题，并在多个体系中验证了该方法能给出更一致、更低的$J$值。
AI.motivation: 传统DFT破缺对称性方法在计算磁交换耦合常数$J$时，因自旋污染而系统性地高估$J$值，现有修正方案多聚焦于能量映射关系的调整，亟需一种从电子态自旋特性本身出发的约束方法来根本改善这一问题。
AI.method: 采用拉格朗日乘子法在DFT能量泛函中施加对$\langle \hat{S}^2 \rangle$的约束，并推导了$\langle \hat{S}^2 \rangle$关于自旋分辨密度矩阵的解析梯度表达式（适用于任意单行列式方法和任意自旋态），从而在广义Kohn-Sham框架下实现自旋约束。
AI.result: 在H₂He、H₃He₃等边三角形及双($μ$-羟基)Cu(II)配合物等体系上的测试表明，自旋约束方法在不同密度泛函近似下均给出系统性更低且更一致的磁交换耦合常数$J$值，优于三种基于能量差的传统方案。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为将自旋态约束纳入DFT研究磁交换相互作用提供了一种鲁棒且普适的途径，有效解决了破缺对称性方法中的自旋污染问题。

title: Vibrations Drive Ultrafast Intersystem Crossing of a Photoexcited Cr(III) Complex
summary: The Cr(III) coordination complex serves as an archetypical 3d transition metal system for probing ultrafast excited-state dynamics with spin conversion due to its intrinsic intersystem crossing (ISC) pathway, $^{4}T_{2g} \rightarrow ^{2}E_{g}$, upon photoexcitation. Here we conduct ab initio molecular dynamics simulations in the $^{4}T_{2g}$ state of a model Cr(III) coordination complex, followed by analyses of multireference electronic structure properties. Across 50 trajectories, the compound retains a persistent Jahn-Teller distortion in the excited state, while exhibiting prominent symmetric metal-ligand bond stretching vibrations with frequencies of 219 cm$^{-1}$ and 465 cm$^{-1}$. State-averaged complete active space self-consistent field (SA-CASSCF) calculations obtain two corresponding normal modes at 225 cm$^{-1}$ and 487 cm$^{-1}$ with symmetric stretching character. The lower-frequency twisting/scissoring mode strongly modulates the $^{4}T_{2g}/^{2}E_{g}$ energy gap, periodically zeroing the energy gap, whereas spin-orbit coupling is essentially invariant to vibrational motion ($\approx$ 60-80 cm$^{-1}$). Furthermore, calculations of single-point excited-state absorption from $^{2}E_{g}$ to a higher ligand-to-metal charge-transfer (LMCT) state indicate that the coherences previously observed in transient absorption spectra arise from nuclear motion on the $^{2}E_{g}$ surface. These results provide insights into the correlation between vibrational motion and electronic transitions, which can facilitate rational molecular design of transition metal complexes with desired excited-state properties by leveraging ligand versatility.

AI.tldr: 通过对Cr(III)配位配合物的从头算分子动力学模拟和多参考电子结构分析，揭示了$^{4}T_{2g}$激发态中Jahn-Teller畸变、对称金属-配体键伸缩振动（219和465 cm⁻¹）以及低频扭曲/剪切振动调控$^{4}T_{2g}/^{2}E_{g}$能隙至零的动力学机制，并指出瞬态吸收光谱中观察到的相干性源于$^{2}E_{g}$表面的核运动。
AI.motivation: 理解Cr(III)配位配合物中自旋转换（$^{4}T_{2g} \rightarrow ^{2}E_{g}$）的超快激发态动力学机制，探究振动运动与电子跃迁之间的关联，为通过配体设计调控过渡金属配合物的激发态性质提供分子层面的理论指导。
AI.method: 在$^{4}T_{2g}$态上对模型Cr(III)配合物进行从头算分子动力学模拟（50条轨迹），结合多参考电子结构性质分析；采用态平均完全活性空间自洽场（SA-CASSCF）计算获得简正模式；计算自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）能及从$^{2}E_{g}$到更高LMCT态的单点激发态吸收。
AI.result: 激发态中持续存在Jahn-Teller畸变；对称金属-配体键伸缩振动频率为219和465 cm⁻¹（SA-CASSCF对应225和487 cm⁻¹）；低频扭曲/剪切振动强烈调制$^{4}T_{2g}/^{2}E_{g}$能隙使其周期性归零；SOC基本不受振动影响（约60-80 cm⁻¹）；$^{2}E_{g}$表面的核运动解释了瞬态吸收光谱中的相干性。
AI.conclusion: 振动运动与电子跃迁之间存在强相关性，低频扭曲/剪切振动通过调控能隙促进ISC，而SOC相对稳定；核运动在$^{2}E_{g}$面上产生光谱相干性。这些发现可指导通过配体工程理性设计具有理想激发态性质的过渡金属配合物。

title: SEDACS: A Scalable Framework for Complex Chemistry Simulations
summary: Graph-based linear-scaling electronic-structure theory provides a scalable framework for parallel quantum-mechanical molecular dynamics (QMD) simulations by exploiting the nearsightedness of the non-local electronic connectivity in non-metallic systems. When combined with recent shadow molecular dynamics in an extended-Lagrangian formulation, it enables stable long-time simulations of large, chemically active systems. This article introduces the Scalable Ecosystem, Driver, and Analyzer for Complex Chemistry Simulations (SEDACS), which integrates all these advances within a modular, Python-based software package for large-scale QMD simulations driven by external electronic-structure codes. SEDACS provides a tunable, adaptive graph construction in which edges encode the non-local electronic overlap between atoms. This graph is then decomposed into a set of smaller, overlapping subgraphs, where the electronic structure of each of these subgraphs is solved for independently and in parallel using an external electronic-structure code. SEDACS can be coupled to a variety of external electronic-structure solvers with minimal modifications to their software, enabling rapid adoption of the graph-based QMD approach. In this way, SEDACS can greatly extend the capability of existing electronic-structure packages by enabling stable QMD simulations of systems that were previously computationally inaccessible. We demonstrate highly efficient and stable QMD simulations for chemically active systems with tens of thousands of atoms by interfacing SEDACS with an external Fortran-based electronic-structure code based on self-consistent-charge density functional tight-binding theory.

AI.tldr: SEDACS是一个基于Python的模块化软件包，通过图分解和并行计算实现大规模量子分子动力学模拟，可显著扩展现有电子结构软件的计算能力。
AI.motivation: 传统量子分子动力学模拟受限于计算规模，难以处理具有化学活性的超大体系（数万原子级别）。现有电子结构软件缺乏高效、可扩展的并行框架来利用非金属系统中的近程电子局域性。
AI.method: SEDACS采用可调自适应图构建方法，以边编码原子间的非局域电子重叠，然后将图分解为多个重叠子图，利用外部电子结构代码独立并行求解每个子图的电子结构。结合扩展拉格朗日形式下的阴影分子动力学，实现稳定的长时间模拟。
AI.result: 通过与基于自洽电荷密度泛函紧束缚理论的Fortran电子结构代码集成，SEDACS成功实现了数万原子规模的化学活性系统的高效稳定量子分子动力学模拟。
AI.conclusion: SEDACS提供了一种模块化、可扩展的解决方案，能以最小修改量集成多种外部电子结构求解器，极大扩展了现有电子结构软件包的能力，使以往计算上不可及的大规模系统模拟成为可能。

title: On the Detection of Curl-Free Gauge Fields
summary: In quantum theory, electromagnetic gauge fields enter directly into the phase evolution of the wavefunction and can even influence quantum systems in regions where the associated electric and magnetic fields vanish. The Aharonov-Bohm effect demonstrates that such gauge fields produce observable consequences when a coherent quantum system encloses magnetic flux along a doubly connected path. This has led to the widespread view that curl-free gauge fields are undetectable in simply connected systems, giving rise to a form of topological blindness. Here we show that this conclusion is not fundamental. During nonequilibrium processes, collective quantum systems can develop transient responses to curl-free gauge fields without enclosing magnetic flux in a static geometry. Using superconducting condensates as a concrete example, we demonstrate that the evolving phase of the macroscopic wavefunction generates supercurrents and voltage pulses whose time integral is proportional to the open-path line integral of the vector potential. In contrast to the conventional Aharonov-Bohm effect, the resulting response is not restricted modulo the flux quantum and may greatly exceed the scale associated with static doubly connected geometries. The mechanism can be interpreted as a dynamical closure of the gauge contour in spacetime and is supported by gauge-invariant arguments, time-dependent Ginzburg-Landau theory modeling, and numerical simulations. These results establish a general principle for detecting curl-free gauge fields and suggest new approaches for probing hidden gauge structures in quantum matter and beyond.

AI.tldr: 本文证明在非平衡过程中，集体量子系统可以响应无旋规范场，而无需像传统Aharonov-Bohm效应那样包围磁通量，通过超导凝聚体的动态相位演化产生可观测的超电流和电压脉冲。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为无旋规范场在单连通系统中不可检测，导致一种"拓扑盲视"。作者希望证明这一结论并非根本性的，从而揭示在非平衡过程中探测隐藏规范结构的可能性。
AI.method: 以超导凝聚体为具体实例，利用含时Ginzburg-Landau理论建模和数值模拟，通过宏观波函数的相位演化产生超电流和电压脉冲，其时间积分正比于矢势的开路径线积分，实现规范轮廓的时空动力学闭合。
AI.result: 非平衡过程中，集体量子系统对无旋规范场的响应不受磁通量子模的限制，且可以远超静态双连通几何结构对应的尺度。数值模拟和规范不变性论证支持该机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个检测无旋规范场的一般性原理，为探测量子物质中的隐藏规范结构提供了新方法，超越了传统Aharonov-Bohm效应的拓扑限制。

title: Optoelectronics and Magnetic properties calculation of RE$_2$MnNiO$_6$ (RE=La-Lu,Y) using Density Functional Theory
summary: RE$_2$MnNiO$_6$ (RE = La-Lu) family of ordered double-perovskite oxides hosts a corner-sharing network of alternating NiO$_6$ and MnO$_6$ octahedra whose electronic and magnetic ground states are systematically governed by the A-site ionic radius through the lanthanide contraction. The strong localisation of RE 4f electrons poses a fundamental challenge to density-functional treatments, yet the hybridisation between 4f and neighbouring 5d (RE) or 3d (Ni, Mn) states is central to the origin of exchange interactions and optoelectronic response across the series. We present a comprehensive first-principles study of the electronic structure, lattice dynamics, and optical properties of representative RE2NiMnO6 compounds within the DFT+U framework. To disentangle the role of Kondo-type 4f-d hybridisation, calculations are performed with the RE 4f electrons treated both as frozen core states and explicitly in the valence manifold, enabling a direct assessment of their contribution to the band structure, dielectric function, and phonon dispersion. Spin-polarised calculations reveal significant spin-channel asymmetry, with magnetic moments reaching up to 30 $μ$B per formula unit for select members of the series. The results establish a unified picture of how 4f occupancy and octahedral distortion collectively determine the magnetic and optoelectronic potential of this double-perovskite family.

AI.tldr: 本文利用DFT+U方法系统研究了RE₂MnNiO₆（RE=La-Lu）双钙钛矿家族中4f电子局域化与八面体畸变对电子结构、晶格动力学和光学性质的协同调控作用，揭示了Kondo型4f-d杂化对磁性和光电性能的关键影响。
AI.motivation: 稀土4f电子的强局域性给密度泛函理论处理带来根本性挑战，但4f与邻近5d（RE）或3d（Ni, Mn）轨道间的杂化对交换相互作用和光电响应的起源至关重要，亟需建立统一的物理图像。
AI.method: 采用DFT+U框架，对代表性RE₂NiMnO₆化合物进行电子结构、晶格动力学和光学性质的第一性原理计算；通过将RE 4f电子分别处理为冻结芯态和价态，直接评估Kondo型4f-d杂化对能带结构、介电函数和声子色散的影响；进行自旋极化计算分析自旋通道不对称性。
AI.result: 自旋极化计算揭示了显著的自旋通道不对称性，部分成员的磁矩高达每化学式单元30 μB；4f占据数和八面体畸变共同决定了该双钙钛矿家族的磁性和光电势能。
AI.conclusion: 4f电子占据与八面体畸变通过协同作用统一决定了该双钙钛矿家族的磁性和光电特性，为理解稀土双钙钛矿材料的设计提供了理论基础。

title: Negative temperature coefficient of Gilbert damping in magnetic bilayers
summary: The Gilbert damping of magnetic materials is an important magnetic parameter that determines the switching speed and energy dissipation of spintronic devices. In simple metals, the intrinsic Gilbert damping increases with temperature and diverges near the Curie temperature as a result of spin fluctuations. Here we present atomistic simulations and experimental measurements showing surprising and opposite behavior in Py/Nd bilayers, where the Gilbert damping decreases with increasing temperature. The effect arises because of the enhanced damping at the interface as a result of spin pumping, where elevated temperatures cause a dynamic separation of the interfacial and bulk magnetization during relaxation. Furthermore, the temperature dependence of the damping can be controlled by varying the thickness of the Nd capping layer. Our findings present a new spintronic effect that can be used to modify the dynamic properties of nanoscale materials and devices for enhanced energy efficiency or with improved switching dynamics.

AI.tldr: Py/Nd双层膜中吉尔伯特阻尼随温度升高而降低，与常规金属行为相反，源于界面自旋泵浦导致的动态磁化分离，且可通过Nd层厚度调控温度依赖性。
AI.motivation: 探究磁性材料中吉尔伯特阻尼的温度依赖性，特别是发现与简单金属传统行为相反的新现象，以实现对自旋电子器件动态特性的调控。
AI.method: 结合原子模拟与实验测量，研究Py/Nd双层膜中吉尔伯特阻尼随温度的变化，并通过改变Nd覆盖层厚度调控温度依赖性。
AI.result: 发现Py/Nd双层膜中吉尔伯特阻尼随温度升高而降低，界面自旋泵浦导致高温时界面与体磁化动态分离，Nd层厚度可调控阻尼的温度依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了一种新的自旋电子效应，可用于调控纳米材料和器件的动态特性，以提高能效或改善开关动力学。

title: Two-orbital $e_g$ model with bond-dependent spin-orbit coupling: A playground for emergent band topology, Kitaev magnetism, and magnetoelectricity
summary: Inspired by the electronic structure of compounds like nickel dihalides Ni$X_2$ ($X$=Cl, Br, I), we propose a low-energy two-orbital $e_g$ model featuring bond-dependent spin-orbit terms, driven by atomic spin-orbit coupling on the ligand $X$. We demonstrate that this model hosts a rich array of phenomena. In the non-interacting band limit, spin-orbit-derived spin-dependent and spin-flip hopping terms produce topological bands with spin-Chern numbers $C_s=\pm 2, \pm 4$, and higher order topological states with fractional corner charges, respectively. In the half-filled Mott insulator limit, we recover a spin-$1$ Hamiltonian with bond-dependent Kitaev exchange interactions. We explore the magnetoelectric effect in this two-orbital model using symmetry-based perspective and microscopic calculations, going beyond the generalized Katsura-Nagaosa-Balatsky theory for the single-orbital case. Our work may be relevant to study of doping, strain, or pressure on Ni$X_2$ and related materials.

AI.tldr: 本文受NiX₂（X=Cl, Br, I）电子结构启发，提出一个低能双轨道eg模型，其中包含由配体X原子自旋-轨道耦合驱动的键依赖自旋-轨道项。该模型在非相互作用能带极限下产生拓扑能带（自旋陈数Cs=±2, ±4）和高阶拓扑态（分数角电荷）；在半满Mott绝缘体极限下恢复为具有键依赖Kitaev交换相互作用的自旋-1哈密顿量。研究还探讨了该双轨道模型中的磁电效应，超越了单轨道情形的广义Katsura-Nagaosa-Balatsky理论。
AI.motivation: 受NiX₂化合物电子结构的启发，提出一个包含键依赖自旋-轨道项的低能双轨道eg模型，以揭示其丰富的拓扑和磁性现象。
AI.method: 构建双轨道eg模型，包含由配体X原子自旋-轨道耦合驱动的键依赖自旋-轨道项；通过非相互作用极限分析拓扑能带结构，通过半满Mott绝缘体极限推导自旋-1 Kitaev交换模型；利用对称性分析和微观计算研究磁电效应。
AI.result: 非相互作用极限下得到自旋陈数Cs=±2, ±4的拓扑能带及具有分数角电荷的高阶拓扑态；半满Mott绝缘体极限下得到键依赖Kitaev交换的自旋-1哈密顿量；揭示了超越单轨道情形的磁电效应。
AI.conclusion: 该工作对NiX₂及相关材料在掺杂、应变或压力下的研究具有参考价值。

title: TransportBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Non-Equilibrium Flow Transport
summary: Scientific machine learning models, as versatile tools for numerical simulation and analysis, are increasingly transforming the landscape of fluid mechanics research. However, existing datasets and benchmarks are primarily limited to continuum fluids and provide limited support for non-equilibrium transport phenomena. To address this gap, we present TransportBench, a high-fidelity dataset and standardized benchmark for non-equilibrium flow transport, designed to reveal the strengths and limitations of neural network models across diverse flow regimes. Specifically, the dataset encompasses a broad physical spectrum, covering continuum and rarefied regimes, low-speed and hypersonic flows, inert and chemically reactive gases, and both translational and internal-energy non-equilibrium effects. Built upon this dataset, we systematically benchmark representative neural architectures using unified evaluation protocols to probe key challenges in learning non-equilibrium flows, including robustness to shock-dominated discontinuities and multi-scale effects, as well as generalization across geometry and physical parameters. Numerical results demonstrate that model performance exhibits a pronounced dependence upon the specific flow characteristics. No single architecture consistently performs best for all the tasks. Instead, different architectural inductive biases provide distinct advantages in capturing smooth flow fields, shock-induced discontinuities, and high-order non-equilibrium statistics. By jointly providing the non-equilibrium flow dataset and model benchmark, TransportBench offers a new testbed for the development, evaluation, and diagnosis of scientific machine learning methods for fluid transport beyond the Navier-Stokes hydrodynamics. The benchmark datasets and implementation codes are available under the MIT license.

AI.tldr: TransportBench是一个面向非平衡流动输运的高保真数据集与标准化基准，涵盖从连续流到稀薄流、低速到高超声速、惰性到化学反应气体的多种流态，系统评估了不同神经网络架构在非平衡流学习中的表现，发现没有单一模型能适用于所有任务。
AI.motivation: 现有科学机器学习数据集和基准主要局限于连续流体，对非平衡输运现象的支持有限，缺乏专门用于评估神经网络在非平衡流动机理学习能力的标准化平台。
AI.method: 构建了涵盖连续流/稀薄流、低速/高超声速、惰性/化学反应气体及平动/内能非平衡效应的广泛物理谱系数据集，并基于统一评估协议系统对比了多种代表性神经网络架构。
AI.result: 模型性能高度依赖于具体流动特性，没有任何单一架构在所有任务上表现最佳；不同架构的归纳偏置分别在光滑流场、激波间断和高阶非平衡统计量捕捉上各具优势。
AI.conclusion: TransportBench为超越Navier-Stokes流体动力学的科学机器学习方法提供了新的测试平台，有助于相关方法的开发、评估与诊断。

title: Valence Ionization Of Water Clusters Formed Inside Helium Nanodroplets
summary: The ionization mechanisms of small H$_2$O/D$_2$O clusters embedded in helium nanodroplets (HNDs) irradiated with extreme ultraviolet photons of energy $hν$ = 21.6 eV are investigated using Penning ionization electron-ion coincidence spectroscopy. Both protonated (H$_2$O)$_{n-1}$H$^{+}$/(D$_2$O)$_{n-1}$D$^{+}$ ($n$ = 3-6) and unprotonated (H$_2$O)$_{n}$$^{+}$/(D$_2$O)$_{n}$$^{+}$ ($n$ = 2-5) cluster ions were observed. Penning ionization electron spectra measured in coincidence with water cluster ions emitted from water clusters doped into both large and small HNDs are analyzed and compared with photoelectron-photoion coincidence spectra measured for free water clusters at $hν$ =20.6 eV. The results reveal suppression of fragmentation inside HNDs and stabilization of intact cluster ions. Quantum chemical calculations support the coexistence of proton-transferred and hemibonded conformers under the cryogenic conditions of helium nanodroplets.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Penning电离电子-离子符合光谱技术，研究了嵌入氦纳米液滴中的小水/重水团簇在21.6 eV极紫外光子照射下的电离机制，发现氦液滴能抑制碎片化并稳定完整团簇离子，量子化学计算支持低温下质子转移和半键构象体的共存。
AI.motivation: 探究嵌入氦纳米液滴中的水团簇在极紫外光照射下的电离机制，特别是氦液滴环境对团簇离子碎片化和稳定性的影响。
AI.method: 使用Penning电离电子-离子符合光谱技术，对比不同大小氦液滴中水团簇的Penning电离电子光谱与自由水团簇的光电子-光离子符合光谱，并辅以量子化学计算。
AI.result: 观察到质子化(H₂O)ₙ₋₁H⁺和未质子化(H₂O)ₙ⁺团簇离子；氦液滴抑制了碎片化并稳定了完整团簇离子；量子化学计算支持质子转移和半键构象体在低温下共存。
AI.conclusion: 氦纳米液滴环境能有效抑制水团簇的电离碎片化，稳定完整团簇离子，且低温条件下质子转移与半键构象体可共存。

title: Dynamical Josephson Effect Between a Singlet and a Triplet Superconductor
summary: Phase-sensitive Josephson effect has long been central to identifying unconventional pairing symmetries in superconductors. Although the selection rules governing Josephson junctions (JJs) are generally determined by the symmetries of the constituent superconductors, we demonstrate that this paradigm is modified in the dynamic regime. By modeling a JJ where spin-singlet and spin-triplet superconductors are separated by a two-dimensional electron gas, we show that a time-dependent gate voltage qualitatively changes the underlying selection rules. This modification arises as a consequence of the gate-controlled spin-orbit coupling. A harmonic modulation of the gate voltage generates an oscillatory $\cos φ$ Josephson component which vanishes in the static limit. The resulting charge current contains both dissipationless and dissipative components, with the latter strongly suppressed at low temperatures. This dynamical Josephson effect could transform the use of JJs in qubits, as sources of spin-triplet currents, and as platforms for proximity effects.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了动态调控下约瑟夫森结的选择定则修正，发现时变栅压可通过自旋轨道耦合产生静态下消失的振荡cosφ约瑟夫森分量，产生低耗散电流，对量子比特和自旋三重态电流源有重要意义。
AI.motivation: 传统上，约瑟夫森结的选择定则由超导体对称性决定，但作者希望探索动态调控（如时变栅压）是否能改变这一范式，从而揭示新的物理效应。
AI.method: 构建了一个自旋单态与自旋三重态超导体被二维电子气分隔的约瑟夫森结模型，通过施加时变栅压来动态调控自旋轨道耦合，理论分析其约瑟夫森效应的变化。
AI.result: 时变栅压的谐波调制产生了静态下不存在的振荡cosφ约瑟夫森分量；电荷电流包含无耗散和耗散两部分，其中耗散分量在低温下被强烈抑制。
AI.conclusion: 动态约瑟夫森效应修正了传统选择定则，可应用于量子比特、自旋三重态电流源及邻近效应平台等领域。

title: A proof of an identity for the critical exponents of jamming
summary: Within the full replica-symmetry-breaking (fullRSB) solution of dense hard spheres in infinite dimension, Charbonneau, Kurchan, Parisi, Urbani, and Zamponi (CKPUZ; J.Stat.Mech.P10009, 2014) introduced three critical exponents $a$, $b$, $c$ governing the matching region of the fullRSB profile near the jamming transition. These exponents satisfy two scaling relations. The first, $b=(1+c)/2$, was established analytically by the diffusion-drift balance in the scaling ansatz. The second, $a+b=1$, was observed numerically to arbitrary precision but could not be proven. The exponents $a,b,c$ of the scaling fullRSB ansatz are related to the physical exponents $α, θ, κ$ that control the gap, force, and overlap distributions by the relations $α=a/b$, $θ=(c-a)/(b-c)$, $κ=c+1$. Crucially, the relation $a+b=1$ yields the scaling relations $α=1/(2+θ)$ and $κ=2-2/(3+θ)$ predicted on independent grounds by the mechanical-marginal-stability arguments of Wyart and collaborators. Here, we give an analytic proof of the identity $a+b=1$ from the scaling fullRSB equations. The proof was obtained through interaction with Claude (Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.7) and verified by us.

AI.tldr: 本文从全复制对称性破缺（fullRSB）方程出发，解析证明了稠密硬球系统在无限维下临近堵塞转变时的临界指数关系 a+b=1，这一关系此前仅被数值观测到但无法证明。该证明通过与Claude（Sonnet 4.6和Opus 4.7）交互获得，并由作者验证。
AI.motivation: CKPUZ此前提出了三个临界指数a、b、c，其中b=(1+c)/2已被解析证明，但a+b=1仅通过数值观测到极高精度却无法从理论上证明。由于该关系决定了物理指数α、θ、κ之间的标度关系，并连接了力学边缘稳定性理论，因此从解析上证明a+b=1至关重要。
AI.method: 从fullRSB标度方程出发，通过解析分析推导出a+b=1的恒等式。特别值得注意的是，该证明是在与Claude（Sonnet 4.6和Opus 4.7）交互过程中获得的，作者对其进行了验证。
AI.result: 成功从fullRSB标度方程解析证明了a+b=1，从而完整确立了三个临界指数a、b、c之间的两个标度关系。这一证明也间接验证了由力学边缘稳定性论证推导出的物理指数关系α=1/(2+θ)和κ=2-2/(3+θ)。
AI.conclusion: a+b=1的解析证明补齐了fullRSB标度理论中缺失的最后一块拼图，将CKPUZ的理论与Wyatt等人的力学边缘稳定性理论完整统一起来，为理解稠密硬球体系在堵塞转变临界点的行为提供了更坚实的理论基础。

title: Commensurability and Gap Enhancement in Superconducting Films Induced by Nonsuperconducting Layers
summary: We find that commensurate resonances in superconducting films endowed with a $SISIS$ structure, where $S$ and $I$ stand for superconducting and insulating layers, respectively, enhance the gap to a value three to four times the bulk gap. Such resonances rely on spatially localized quantum states that arise due to the commensurability between the total film thickness and the distance between the two insulating barriers. Our results are obtained in the context of the Bogoliubov-de Gennes equations within the Anderson approximation, applied here to Bi films, where quantum size effects are possible due to the abnormally large mean free path.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，具有SISIS结构的超导薄膜中，由于总膜厚与绝缘层间距的匹配共振，可将超导能隙提升至体材料能隙的3-4倍。该结果基于安德森近似下的Bogoliubov-de Gennes方程，应用于平均自由程异常大的Bi薄膜。
AI.motivation: 探索通过量子尺寸效应和共振机制来增强超导薄膜的超导能隙，寻找突破体材料超导性能限制的新途径。
AI.method: 采用安德森近似下的Bogoliubov-de Gennes方程，研究具有SISIS（超导-绝缘-超导-绝缘-超导）多层结构的Bi薄膜中的超导特性。
AI.result: SISIS结构中的匹配共振可将超导能隙提升至体材料能隙的3-4倍，这种增强依赖于总膜厚与两个绝缘势垒之间距离的匹配性产生的空间局域量子态。
AI.conclusion: 通过合理设计SISIS多层结构中的几何参数（膜厚与势垒间距），可以利用量子尺寸效应显著增强超导性能，为超导薄膜的优化设计提供了新思路。

title: Shift current conductivity in monolayer SnS: a tight-binding analysis
summary: We investigate the bulk photovoltaic effect in monolayer SnS using an effective tight-binding model derived from first-principles calculations. By comparing short-range and long-range hopping models, we show that the essential features of the shift current conductivity are captured by a minimal model. The shift current is decomposed into transition intensity and shift vector, enabling identification of dominant interband transitions. The comparison reveals that long-range hopping processes quantitatively modify the peak positions and magnitudes, while the short-range model retains the characteristic low-energy structure of the nonlinear response. Our findings provide a transparent framework for understanding and designing bulk photovoltaic effects in two-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 本文利用基于第一性原理推导的有效紧束缚模型，研究了单层SnS中的体光伏效应。通过比较短程和长程跳迁模型，发现短程模型能捕捉到非线性响应的主要特征，而长程跳迁则定量修正了峰值位置和幅度。研究为理解和设计二维材料中的体光伏效应提供了清晰框架。
AI.motivation: 理解二维材料（特别是单层SnS）中体光伏效应的微观机制，并建立透明且可解释的理论框架，以便于设计和优化此类材料的光电响应。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理推导有效紧束缚模型，构建短程和长程两种跳迁模型；将位移电流分解为跃迁强度和位移矢量，分析主导的带间跃迁贡献。
AI.result: 短程模型能保留低能区的非线性响应特征结构；长程跳迁会定量改变峰位和峰强，但不改变定性特征。
AI.conclusion: 短程紧束缚模型足以捕捉二维材料体光伏效应的核心物理，为设计高效光电材料提供了理论指导。

title: Second-Order Synaptic Memory using Inherent Plasticity of Moiré Superlattices
comment: This is a pre-peer review version. The published version of record and the supporting info can be obtained from the publisher's website using the url: https://doi.org/10.1002/adma.202509837
summary: Achieving synaptic functionality electronically in a single-element quantum material is a fundamental challenge, as conventional methods rely on the introduction of extrinsic charge-traps or polar components. Here, we demonstrate that twisted double bilayer graphene (tDBLG) moiré superlattices, composed purely of carbon, exhibit electronic hysteresis and plasticity in presence of twist-angle disorder. Inversion symmetry breaking at the moiré length scales also gives rise to second-order nonlinear electrical response via disorder-mediated extrinsic mechanisms. Such second-order nonlinearity is highly tunable in both sign and magnitude by varying carrier concentration and vertical displacement field. We harness the coexistence of electronic plasticity and second-order nonlinearity to realize a second-order synaptic memory device. Our findings establish strained moiré carbon systems as a powerful new platform for energy-efficient neuromorphic computing, demonstrating that complex electronic functionality can emerge purely from symmetry breaking physics in a single-element material.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了扭转双层石墨烯（tDBLG）莫尔超晶格在纯碳材料中实现电子迟滞和突触可塑性，并利用二阶非线性电响应构建了二阶突触存储器件，为单元素材料中的神经形态计算提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖引入外来电荷陷阱或极性组分来实现突触功能，作者希望探索是否能在单一元素量子材料中通过对称性破缺直接实现突触电子功能。
AI.method: 采用扭转双层石墨烯莫尔超晶格，利用扭转角无序引入的对称性破缺，在材料中产生电子迟滞、可塑性以及二阶非线性电响应；通过调控载流子浓度和垂直位移场来调节非线性响应的符号和幅度。
AI.result: 成功实现了纯碳材料中的电子迟滞和塑性行为，观察到高度可调的二阶非线性电响应，并基于上述特性构建了二阶突触存储器件。
AI.conclusion: 应变莫尔碳系统可作为高效神经形态计算的新平台，表明复杂电子功能可以从单元素材料中的对称性破缺物理中涌现出来。

title: Simulating Condensed Matter Physics on Quantum Hardware
summary: Quantum hardware platforms are getting increasingly sophisticated in their ability to simulate condensed matter, including but not limited to strongly-correlated, topological, and non-equilibrium phenomena. This review surveys recent progress in quantum-hardware-based simulations of condensed matter, primarily emphasizing gate-based digital quantum computer simulation, with analog experiments discussed as complementary benchmarks. We first review major hardware platforms, including superconducting qubits, trapped-ions, ultracold atoms, Rydberg arrays, photonic systems, and moire quantum materials. We then introduce the basic ingredients of digital quantum simulation. Building on this foundation, we discuss representative applications to condensed-matter physics, spanning ground-state problems, strongly correlated matter, topological phases, non-equilibrium dynamics, open-system physics, and high-energy-physics-inspired simulations. Finally, we summarize key methodological tools used in state-of-the-art quantum-simulation workflows. We emphasize that present noisy quantum simulations serve not only as near-term demonstrations, but also as prototypes for the encodings, diagnostic protocols and error-control strategies required for future fault-tolerant quantum simulation.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了近年来基于量子硬件（特别是门控数字量子计算机）模拟凝聚态物理的进展，涵盖超导量子比特、离子阱、超冷原子、里德伯阵列、光子系统等硬件平台，以及基态问题、强关联物质、拓扑相、非平衡动力学、开放系统和高能物理启发模拟等应用领域，并强调当前有噪声的量子模拟不仅是近期演示，更是未来容错量子模拟的编码、诊断和纠错策略的原型。
AI.motivation: 量子硬件平台在模拟强关联、拓扑和非平衡凝聚态现象方面日益成熟，需要系统性地总结当前数字和模拟量子模拟在凝聚态物理中的进展与方法论，以指导未来容错量子模拟的发展。
AI.method: 采用综述方法，首先回顾主要量子硬件平台（超导、离子阱、超冷原子、里德伯阵列、光子、莫尔量子材料），介绍数字量子模拟的基本要素，然后按应用领域（基态、强关联、拓扑相、非平衡、开放系统、高能物理启发）组织代表性工作，最后总结关键方法论工具。
AI.result: 展示了量子模拟在多个凝聚态物理子领域中的代表性应用，并指出当前有噪声的中等规模量子（NISQ）模拟已能作为未来容错量子模拟的编码方案、诊断协议和错误控制策略的试验平台。
AI.conclusion: 当前噪声量子模拟虽有限制，但已为未来容错量子模拟奠定了编码、诊断和纠错的基础；量子模拟正在从近端演示向实用化、容错化方向演进。

title: Geometric aspects of spin transport in magnetic multilayers
summary: We discuss spin-dependent transfer-matrix formalism applied to magnetic multilayers in geometric terms. Starting from the stationary Schrödinger equation rewritten as a first-order spatial evolution problem, we interpret the transfer matrix as a path-ordered exponential and relate its matching-matrix construction to a noncompact group constraint. We thenconnect the induced Möbius action on reflection matrices to an Iwasawa decomposition, identify Weyl-chamber variables as the minimal noncompact transport invariants, and show how torque-related spin structures arise from compact-sector and commutator contributions. A sequence of multilayer examples illustrates the transition from pure spin filtering to controlled spin-orbit mixing and the resulting deformation of Weyl-chamber trajectories. We finally comment on the extension to higher-dimensional internal spaces relevant to orbital transport and realistic calculations.

AI.tldr: 本文用几何语言重新表述了磁性多层膜的自旋相关转移矩阵理论，将其与路径有序指数、Iwasawa分解和Weyl chamber变量等概念联系起来，并展示了从纯自旋过滤到自旋-轨道混合的转变。
AI.motivation: 传统的自旋转移矩阵方法虽然有效，但其几何结构和内在对称性尚未被充分揭示。作者希望通过几何视角（如群约束、Möbius变换、Iwasawa分解）来统一理解自旋输运的不变量和自旋扭矩的起源。
AI.method: 从定态薛定谔方程出发，将其重写为一阶空间演化问题；将转移矩阵解释为路径有序指数；通过匹配矩阵构造引入非紧致群约束；将反射矩阵上的Möbius作用与Iwasawa分解联系起来；识别Weyl chamber变量为最小非紧致输运不变量；分析紧致部分和对易子对自旋结构的贡献。
AI.result: 展示了从纯自旋过滤到受控自旋-轨道混合的转变，以及Weyl chamber轨迹的相应形变；还讨论了向高维内禀空间（如轨道输运）的扩展。
AI.conclusion: 该几何框架为理解和设计磁性多层膜中的自旋输运提供了更深入的理论工具，并为未来更复杂的（如轨道输运）计算奠定了基础。

title: Spin-$s$ model with competing interactions on diamond-decorated lattices
summary: We investigate the ground state properties, magnetization, and low-temperature thermodynamics of the ferromagnetic-antiferromagnetic spin-$s$ model on diamond-decorated lattices with ideal diamond units, incorporating bilinear Heisenberg and higher-order exchange interactions between diagonal spins-$σ$. Local conservation of the composite spin on each diamond diagonal enables exact analysis. For the pure Heisenberg case, the system undergoes a series of $2σ$ transitions between monomer-dimer (MD), ferrimagnetic (Ferri) and ferromagnetic (F) phases with different optimal composite spin values as the coupling ratio varies. In the presence of higher-order interactions, a multicritical point exists where the states with all possible values of composite spin are degenerate, leading to maximal ground state degeneracy. The case $s=σ=1$ with bilinear and biquadratic interactions is studied in detail. Its phase diagram comprises three phases - F, Ferri and MD, which meet at a triple point. On the phase boundaries, the ground state becomes macroscopically degenerate. For the diamond chain, we calculate the ground state degeneracy exactly; for higher dimensions, the problem maps onto a bond percolation framework, solved numerically. The residual entropy per spin reaches up to $60\%$ of the maximal value, peaking at the triple point. Low-temperature magnetization curves in external magnetic fields exhibit plateaus and jumps. The excitation spectrum is gapped in the MD phase, gapless in the F phase, and resembles that of the Lieb-Mattis ferrimagnet in the Ferri phase. The high residual entropy suggests potential applications in ultra-low-temperature cooling and quantum thermal machines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了金刚石装饰晶格上铁磁-反铁磁自旋模型的基态性质、磁化和低温热力学。通过复合自旋的局域守恒实现了精确分析，揭示了纯海森堡情况下的多相转变，以及在更高阶相互作用下的多临界点和宏观简并。研究发现残余熵可达最大值的60%，激发谱在不同相中展现出不同特征，暗示了在超低温冷却和量子热机中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索金刚石装饰晶格上铁磁-反铁磁自旋模型的丰富相图和多临界行为，特别是高阶相互作用导致的宏观基态简并和残余熵，为超低温冷却和量子热机等应用提供理论基础。
AI.method: 利用金刚石对角线上复合自旋的局域守恒性质实现精确解析；对于纯海森堡情形，解析推导不同耦合比下的相变序列；对于高阶相互作用，将高维问题映射为键逾渗框架进行数值求解；通过精确计数和数值方法计算基态简并度和残余熵。
AI.result: 纯海森堡情形下系统经历2σ次相变（MD→Ferri→F）；存在多临界点使所有复合自旋态简并；s=σ=1的相图含F、Ferri、MD三相，在三相点处基态宏观简并；残余熵最高达最大值的60%；激发谱在MD相有能隙，F相无能隙，Ferri相类似Lieb-Mattis铁磁体；低温磁化曲线呈现平台和跳跃。
AI.conclusion: 该模型具有丰富的基态相图和独特的低温热力学性质，高残余熵和可调激发谱使其在超低温冷却和量子热机领域具有潜在应用价值。

title: Generation and time evolution of anomalous Floquet Majorana flat edge modes in two-dimensional noncolinear magnet-superconductor heterostructures
comment: 12 Pages, 6 PDF Figures, Comments are welcome
summary: We theoretically investigate the realization of gapless Floquet topological superconducting phases in a two-dimensional magnet-superconductor heterostructure (2D Shiba lattice) in the presence of a harmonic drive implemented in the chemical potential. Employing a real-space tight-binding model, we obtain both the regular $0$- and anomalous $π$-Floquet Majorana flat edge modes (FMFEMs) in the quasi-energy spectrum. We also study the real-time evolution of the FMFEMs and analyze their local density of states in the presence of such a periodic drive. The topological characterization is performed using the winding number, exploiting the chiral symmetry of the equivalent bulk effective momentum-space Hamiltonian. This is also supported by the corresponding edge state spectra. Furthermore, we employ the Brillouin-Wigner (BW) and Floquet perturbation theory (FPT) to gain analytical insight into the problem. We compare our exact (numerical), BW, and FPT results in terms of the quasi-energy spectra obtained across different frequency regimes. We find good agreement between the exact numerical, BW, and FPT results in the higher-frequency and high-amplitude domain, particularly close to the $0$-quasi-energy modes.

AI.tldr: 该论文理论上研究了二维磁体-超导体异质结构（Shiba晶格）在化学势谐波驱动下实现无间隙Floquet拓扑超导相，发现了0型和π型Floquet马约拉纳平边缘模，并通过卷绕数、布里渊-维格纳微扰理论和Floquet微扰理论进行了拓扑表征与解析分析。
AI.motivation: 探索在周期驱动（Floquet工程）条件下，二维磁体-超导体异质结构中能否实现无间隙的Floquet拓扑超导相，并产生Floquet马约拉纳边缘模。
AI.method: 采用实空间紧束缚模型获得准能谱中的0型和π型FMFEMs；通过实时演化分析其局域态密度；利用卷绕数（基于手征对称性）进行拓扑表征，并用边缘态谱佐证；使用布里渊-维格纳微扰理论和Floquet微扰理论进行解析分析。
AI.result: 成功观测到0型和π型FMFEMs；在较高频率和高振幅区域，精确数值结果与BW及FPT结果吻合良好，尤其在0-准能模附近。
AI.conclusion: 化学势的周期驱动可在二维Shiba晶格中有效实现无间隙Floquet拓扑超导相，解析微扰理论在高频高振幅下与数值结果一致，验证了方法的可靠性。

title: Skyrmion and meron phases induced by spin-phonon coupling
summary: In chiral magnets, magnetic skyrmions are typically stabilized by the competition between exchange and Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions under an external magnetic field, while the role of lattice degrees of freedom has received comparatively less attention. Here we study how spin-phonon (SP) coupling modifies magnetic interactions and the resulting spin textures in a two-dimensional skyrmion model in the square lattice. Using Monte Carlo simulations, we compare two simplified models describing the SP coupling: the Einstein site-phonon (ESP) and bond-phonon (BP) models. We find that ESP coupling stabilizes skyrmion crystals in field regimes that are topologically trivial in the uncoupled model and also induces additional textures, including meron-antimeron (M-aM) crystals and mixed skyrmion-bimeron (SkX-Bm) phases. Furthermore, for sufficiently strong phonon coupling, the conventional triple-$\textbf{q}$ hexagonal skyrmion lattice is distorted into a double-$\textbf{q}$ square skyrmion lattice. Overall, our results show that lattice effects provide a simple mechanism to tune topological magnetic phases.

AI.tldr: 本文通过蒙特卡洛模拟研究了二维手性磁体中自旋-声子耦合对磁性斯格明子结构的影响，发现该耦合能稳定新的拓扑自旋纹理，包括meron-antimeron晶体、混合skyrmion-bimeron相，并可将传统六角形斯格明子晶格畸变为方形晶格。
AI.motivation: 在手性磁体中，磁斯格明子通常由交换作用和Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用在磁场下稳定，而晶格自由度（自旋-声子耦合）的作用较少被研究，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛模拟，在方形晶格上构建二维斯格明子模型，对比两种简化的自旋-声子耦合模型：爱因斯坦位点声子（ESP）模型和键声子（BP）模型。
AI.result: ESP耦合能在拓扑平庸的场区域稳定斯格明子晶体，诱导出meron-antimeron晶体和混合skyrmion-bimeron相；强耦合下，传统三重q六角形斯格明子晶格畸变为双重q方形斯格明子晶格。
AI.conclusion: 晶格效应（自旋-声子耦合）为调控拓扑磁性相提供了一种简单机制。

title: Enhanced superconductivity in atomically thin noble metals: From quantum confinement to interface-induced Lifshitz transition
summary: Unlocking superconductivity in intrinsically non-superconducting noble metals (Au, Ag, Cu) represents a fundamental challenge in low-dimensional physics. While quantum confinement in the atomically thin limit is known to trigger emergent superconductivity, strategies to amplify this marginal effect to experimentally accessible temperatures remain a key open question. Using first-principles calculations, we establish a unified framework linking intrinsic confinement effects with interface engineering in noble metal films. We reveal that intrinsic superconductivity is element-specific: it is suppressed in Ag by a stiff phonon spectrum, but emerges in trilayer Cu ($T_{\rm C} \approx 0.78$ K) and pentalayer Au ($0.63$ K) driven by confinement-induced density-of-states (DOS) enhancement and phonon softening, respectively. In h-BN/Cu(111) heterostructures, $T_{\rm C}$ is critically dictated by the interfacial stacking configuration. We identify the thermodynamically stable N-bonded interface as a reliable platform for accessible superconductivity ($T_{\rm C} \approx 3.23$ K), whereas manipulating the system into a metastable B-bonded configuration boosts $T_{\rm C}$ to $7.00$ K. This enhancement originates from a B-bonded-induced Lifshitz transition, where the Fermi surface forms a tangential contact with the Brillouin zone boundary at the M point, enhancing electron-phonon coupling beyond DOS effects. Our work unifies the understanding of intrinsic two-dimensional superconductivity with atomistic interface design, offering a blueprint for functionalizing noble metals as emergent superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，揭示了在超薄极限下，贵金属（Au、Ag、Cu）可因量子限域效应产生本征超导电性，并通过h-BN界面工程将Cu薄膜的超导转变温度从约0.78 K提升至最高7.00 K，建立了低维超导与原子级界面设计的统一框架。
AI.motivation: 在 intrinsically non-superconducting 的贵金属（Au、Ag、Cu）中实现超导电性是低维物理的核心挑战，且如何将量子限域引起的微弱超导效应提升至实验可观测温度是关键未解问题。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，建立本征限域效应与界面工程关联的统一框架；通过分析态密度（DOS）增强、声子软化、Lifshitz相变及电子-声子耦合等机制，研究不同厚度、不同界面堆叠构型（h-BN/Cu(111)）下的超导转变温度。
AI.result: Ag因声子谱刚硬而抑制超导；三层Cu（Tc≈0.78 K）由DOS增强驱动，五层Au（Tc≈0.63 K）由声子软化驱动。h-BN/Cu(111)异质结构中，N键合界面稳定且Tc≈3.23 K，而亚稳态B键合界面因Lifshitz相变使Tc提升至7.00 K。
AI.conclusion: 本研究统一了本征二维超导与原子级界面设计的理解，为将贵金属功能化为新兴超导体提供了蓝图。

title: Anharmonic lattice dynamics and superconductivity in strained bulk and surface niobium
summary: Using first-principles calculations, we investigate how homogeneous strain and crystallographic surface orientation modify the vibrational and superconducting properties of niobium. For bulk Nb, tensile strain strongly softens the phonon spectrum and enhances the electron--phonon coupling, increasing the superconducting transition temperature from 9.5 K at equilibrium to 14.5 K at $\sim\!6\%$ lattice expansion. For the low-index Nb(001), Nb(110), and Nb(111) surfaces, harmonic phonon calculations exhibit imaginary modes, showing that anharmonic lattice effects are essential. To treat these effects efficiently, we train Nb-specific machine-learning interatomic potentials on bulk and slab first-principles configurations and use them to accelerate stochastic self-consistent harmonic approximation calculations, thereby obtaining anharmonically renormalized phonon modes that are combined with density-functional perturbation theory electron--phonon matrix elements to construct the Eliashberg spectral function. Among the clean free-standing slabs considered here, Nb(001) exhibits the strongest electron--phonon coupling and the highest calculated transition temperature of 10.0 K, while Nb(110) and Nb(111) show progressively reduced pairing strength. Finally, by analyzing the Eliashberg spectral function and the functional derivative $δT_\text{c}/δα^2F(ω)$, we identify the phonon energy ranges most effective for superconducting pairing. Our results show that strain, surface termination, and anharmonic phonon renormalization provide complementary and interrelated microscopic routes for tuning superconductivity in Nb.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，系统研究了均匀应变和晶体表面取向如何调控铌(Nb)的超导性质。研究发现：拉伸应变可使体相Nb的Tc从9.5K提升至14.5K；在三个低指数表面中，Nb(001)表面展现出最强的电子-声子耦合，Tc为10.0K；同时结合机器学习势和随机自洽谐波近似方法，揭示了应变、表面终止和非简谐声子重整化是调控Nb超导性的互补微观途径。
AI.motivation: 理解均质应变和不同晶体表面取向如何影响铌(Nb)的振动特性和超导性质，寻找调控超导转变温度的微观机制。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，结合机器学习原子间势加速随机自洽谐波近似(SSCHA)处理非简谐效应，再与密度泛函微扰理论(DFPT)计算的电子-声子矩阵元结合构建Eliashberg谱函数，分析超导转变温度。
AI.result: 体相Nb拉伸应变使Tc从9.5K升至14.5K(约6%晶格膨胀)；Nb(001)表面Tc为10.0K，强于Nb(110)和Nb(111)；通过Eliashberg谱函数和功能导数识别了最有效的声子能量范围。
AI.conclusion: 应变、表面终止和非简谐声子重整化是调控Nb超导性的互补且相互关联的微观途径。

title: Stress-triggered atomic explosion of trapped hydrogen initiates crack nucleation
comment: We demonstrate the indispensable role of defect-trapped hydrogen (DTH) in initiating crack nucleation in the absence of diffusive hydrogen, overturning the conventional theory of hydrogen embrittlement from Sir Johnson in 1875. The Main text 13 Pages, 1 table plus 4 figures
summary: Hydrogen embrittlement (HE) has persisted for more than a century as one of the most intractable problems in materials science. The prevailing view1 that diffusive H governs embrittlement has fostered the widespread assumption that H trapping at crystal defects mitigates HE. Here we overturn this conventional paradigm. Using plasma/ion irradiation of tungsten, we decouple -- for the first time -- H-induced crack nucleation from subsequent cavity propagation, and reveal nucleation as a two-stage mechanochemical fracture instability enabled by trapped H in the absence of diffusive H. In the first stage, H accumulation to a critical occupancy at dislocation cores acts as a chemical fuse, collapsing the local cohesive strength to a threshold at which infinitesimal external loads can trigger atomic decohesion. This bond rupture instantaneously enables the second stage: confined recombination of atomic hydrogen into molecular form. The abrupt release of chemical energy within an atomically restricted volume generates a transient inflation pressure that drives a dynamic, brittle jump to an internal macroscopic cavity. By separating mechanical decohesion triggering from energetic crack driving, our results provide a deterministic framework for the onset of H-induced crack nucleation under low-stress conditions. Furthermore, we place experimentally the classical H-enhanced decohesion model on an atomistic foundation and elevate it from phenomenology to prediction. Finally, by shifting the focus from experimentally elusive diffusive H to directly measurable trapped H, this work reframes HE as a deterministic, quantifiable instability, establishing a new paradigm for understanding and mitigating H-induced failure in high-strength metals.

AI.tldr: 本文通过等离子体/离子辐照钨的实验，颠覆了传统氢脆理论，证明氢脆是由位错核心处被困氢（而非扩散氢）引发的两阶段机械化学断裂失稳，将氢脆从现象学提升为可预测的确定性框架。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为扩散氢主导氢脆，且氢被晶体缺陷捕获可缓解氢脆。本文旨在推翻这一范式，首次将氢致裂纹成核与随后的空腔扩展解耦，揭示被困氢在无扩散氢条件下的作用机制。
AI.method: 采用等离子体/离子辐照钨的实验方法，实现氢致裂纹成核与空腔扩展过程的分离；结合理论分析，揭示两阶段机械化学断裂失稳过程。
AI.result: 发现氢在位错核心积累至临界占据率时，会局部崩溃内聚强度，使外部载荷触发原子脱聚；随后原子氢重组为分子氢，在原子尺度受限体积内释放化学能，产生瞬态膨胀压力，驱动裂纹动态脆性跳跃至宏观空腔。
AI.conclusion: 将经典氢增强脱聚模型从现象学提升为原子尺度的可预测模型，将关注点从难以测量的扩散氢转向可直接测量的被困氢，建立了氢脆作为确定性、可量化失稳的新范式。

title: Spin-wave phase modulation using magnetic domain walls in dipolarly coupled structures for non-volatile magnonic computation
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, supplementary material document provided
summary: A controllable phase shifter is a key component for spin-wave-based logic and information processing devices. Here, we propose a domain-wall-position-controlled spin-wave phase shifter that exploits dipolar coupling between two closely spaced waveguides to enable continuous phase tuning over a range approaching 360degrees while keeping the spin-wave amplitude constant. Using micromagnetic simulations, we model a bias-free hybrid structure composed of a nanoscale waveguide magnetostatically coupled to a half-ring-shaped structure both made from bismuth-doped yttrium iron garnet with strong perpendicular magnetic anisotropy. Displacing a domain wall in the half-ring modulates the dispersion relation in the adjacent straight waveguide due to the changed magnetostatic interaction, providing a compact and dynamically reconfigurable phase-shifting mechanism. This approach offers precise and non-volatile control over spin-wave propagation and is compatible with energy-efficient magnonic logic architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于磁畴壁位置调控的自旋波移相器，通过两个紧密耦合波导间的偶极相互作用，实现接近360°的连续相位调谐，同时保持自旋波振幅不变。
AI.motivation: 自旋波逻辑与信息处理器件需要可控的移相器作为关键组件，现有方案在连续相位调谐范围和振幅稳定性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 采用微磁学模拟，构建了一个由纳米波导和半环形结构组成的无偏置混合系统（材料为掺铋钇铁石榴石，具有强垂直磁各向异性），通过在半环中移动磁畴壁来改变磁静相互作用，从而调控相邻直波导中的色散关系。
AI.result: 实现了接近360°的连续相位调谐范围，且自旋波振幅保持恒定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了精确、非易失的自旋波传播控制，与节能型磁子逻辑架构兼容，为紧凑型可重构移相器设计提供了新思路。

title: Phase transitions through excited-state level crossings and topological indicators: the case of the XXZ chain with staggered Ising interaction
summary: We combine two ways of determining the phase diagram of the spin-$1/2$ XXZ chain with a staggered Ising interaction and uniform transverse exchange, based on exact diagonalization. The model realizes a competition between Néel order and bond-dimerized phases generated by the alternating Ising interaction. The simplest approach to determine the phase boundaries is to use topological indicators based on generalized position operators. We show that in general, the bosonized and numerical results for the topological indicators agree. The second is based on crossings of excited energy levels and justified by conformal-field theory. In spite of the partial loss of translational symmetry caused by the alternating Ising interaction, we find that the latter method provides an accurate determination of the boundary between Néel and dimerized phases. Instead, while the jumps of a topological indicator provide a qualitatively correct phase diagram, its accuracy is affected when the gap is very small (or the correlation length very large) at one side of the transition, as we show using field-theoretical arguments. The combination of both methods provides a more efficient way of calculating phase diagrams for correlated one-dimensional models than other widely used conventional approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文通过精确对角化结合拓扑指标和能级交叉两种方法，确定了具有交错Ising相互作用的XXZ自旋链的相图，发现两种方法互补，能更高效地计算一维关联模型的相图。
AI.motivation: 准确确定自旋-1/2 XXZ链在交错Ising相互作用下的相图，尤其是Néel有序相与键二聚化相之间的相边界。
AI.method: 结合两种方法：(1) 基于广义位置算符的拓扑指标；(2) 基于激发态能级交叉（符合共形场论）。通过精确对角化实现，并用场论论证分析精度。
AI.result: 拓扑指标跳跃定性正确，但在能隙小/关联长度大的一侧精度受限；能级交叉方法即使平移对称性部分破坏，也能准确确定相边界；两者结合更高效。
AI.conclusion: 组合使用拓扑指标和能级交叉方法，比传统方法更高效地计算一维关联模型的相图。

title: Bipolar-doped superconducting infinite-layer cuprates
summary: Distilling the intrinsic physics of the superconducting CuO2 plane from the complexities of charge-reservoir layers is a defining challenge in high-temperature superconductivity. While superconducting electron-doped infinite-layer cuprates have been synthesized, controllable and uniform hole doping has long remained elusive despite exploratory attempts, limiting spectroscopic insights. Here, we realize bipolar doping across infinite-layer (Sr,Eu)CuO2 and (Ca,Li)CuO2+δ single-crystalline thin films, mapping the electronic phase diagram. Both electron- and hole-doped films show pronounced electrical resistance anisotropy, indicating the quasi-two-dimensional nature of the CuO2 planes. Angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy across electron- and hole-doped regimes reveals persistent antiferromagnetic band folding coexisting with superconductivity. Remarkably, at a hole doping ~0.07 determined by Luttinger volume, the antiferromagnetic folding emerges from Fermi arcs within the film's single Fermi surface, with the onset superconducting transition temperature exceeding 60 K. These findings redefine the interplay between magnetic order and superconductivity and establish a definitive platform to investigate the intrinsic mechanism of high-temperature superconducting cuprates.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实现无限层铜氧化物薄膜的双极性掺杂，绘制了电子相图，发现空穴掺杂约0.07时反铁磁折叠从费米弧中出现，超导转变温度超过60 K，重新定义了磁有序与超导的相互作用。
AI.motivation: 从电荷储备层的复杂性中蒸馏出超导CuO2平面的内在物理是高温超导的核心挑战。尽管电子掺杂的无限层铜氧化物已实现，但可控且均匀的空穴掺杂长期未能突破，限制了光谱学研究。
AI.method: 在(Sr,Eu)CuO2和(Ca,Li)CuO2+δ单晶薄膜上实现双极性掺杂，通过电阻率各向异性测量和角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）表征电子结构。
AI.result: 电子和空穴掺杂薄膜均表现出显著电阻各向异性，证实CuO2平面的准二维性。ARPES显示反铁磁带折叠与超导共存。在空穴掺杂约0.07时，反铁磁折叠从费米弧中涌现，超导转变温度超过60 K。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现重新定义了磁有序与超导之间的相互作用，并为研究高温超导铜氧化物的内在机制建立了明确的平台。

title: Unconventional crystallization pathway bypassing the intermediate cubic phase in phase-change superlattices
summary: The Ge-Sb-Te (GST) superlattice phase-change material is a promising candidate for overcoming the high power-consumption of phase-change memory (PCM). However, the working mechanism of the superlattice PCM remains controversial. Partial amorphization, which is currently considered the most plausible mechanism, remains hotly debated: how does the partially amorphized GST recrystallize into its superlattice phase instead of the conventionally expected cubic phase? Here, we address this issue using large-scale molecular dynamics simulations enabled by a machine-learning interatomic potential. Starting from a partially melted GST superlattice, we demonstrate that the residual crystalline regions serve as nuclei, enabling the amorphous GST to recrystallize directly into the superlattice phase without passing through the intermediate cubic phase. Moreover, the recrystallized phase is not an ideal superlattice, but rather a structurally ordered and chemically disordered defective superlattice characterized by anti-site defects and stacking faults. The defective superlattice region is also more susceptible to melting than the defect-free superlattice, and thereby can act as the active region of the PCM device. These results help to clarify the longstanding debates concerning the mechanism of superlattice-based PCM.

AI.tldr: 本文利用机器学习势函数的大规模分子动力学模拟，揭示了Ge-Sb-Te超晶格相变材料在部分非晶化后，残存晶区作为晶核直接重结晶为超晶格相（而非立方相），且重结晶相为存在反位缺陷和堆垛层错的有序结构缺陷超晶格，该缺陷区域更易熔化，可作为PCM器件的活性区。
AI.motivation: Ge-Sb-Te超晶格相变材料有望解决相变存储器的高功耗问题，但其工作机制（尤其是部分非晶化机制的争议）尚不明确，核心争议在于部分非晶化的GST如何重结晶为超晶格相而非传统立方相。
AI.method: 采用机器学习势函数（machine-learning interatomic potential）驱动的大规模分子动力学模拟，从部分熔化的GST超晶格出发，模拟其重结晶过程。
AI.result: 1) 残存晶区作为晶核，非晶GST可直接重结晶为超晶格相，无需经过中间立方相；2) 重结晶相不是理想超晶格，而是存在反位缺陷和堆垛层错的缺陷超晶格（结构有序但化学无序）；3) 缺陷超晶格区域比无缺陷超晶格更易熔化，可作为PCM器件的活性区。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果有助于澄清关于超晶格PCM机制的长久争议。

title: Epitaxial $\mathrm{Co_2MnSi}$ with intrinsic magnetocrystalline anisotropy as a route to bias-field-free nonlinear half-metal magnonics at the nanoscale
summary: Half-metallic Heusler compounds like $\mathrm{Co_2MnSi}$ allow to bridge magnonic and spintronic functionality for hybrid unconventional computing approaches with sought-after properties like 100% spin polarization and associated low Gilbert damping $α\leq 10^{-3}$. However, the desirable material parameters are inherently tied to the crystal lattice with a particularly critical dependence on structural order in $\mathrm{Co_2MnSi}$. To date, the successful fabrication of nanoscale devices with robust structural integrity remains yet a challenge, and consequently the impact of the material parameters on the resulting nonlinear spin-wave dynamics remains largely unexplored. Here, we report on a study of linear and nonlinear spin-wave dynamics in transversally magnetized $\mathrm{Co_2MnSi}$ waveguides with impeccable crystalline ordering. We show that epitaxial, $\mathrm{L2}_1$-ordered $\mathrm{Co_2MnSi}$ exhibits an intrinsic cubic anisotropy with first- and second-order contributions, stabilizing a magnetization alignment along the crystal $\langle110\rangle$ directions. We confirm the implication of an unaffected crystal structure resulting in preserved magnetic properties in the patterned structures. Herein, the persistent magnetocrystalline anisotropy reshapes the spin-wave dispersion which yields a first-order nonlinear instability suppression range extending over several GHz - even for vanishing bias fields. Moreover, the intrinsic magnetocrystalline anisotropy can be exploited to counteract shape demagnetization for a stabilized low bias field operation in the favourable Damon-Eshbach geometry with high group velocities and decay lengths. Together with the proven half-metallicity and ultralow Gilbert damping, this research establishes $\mathrm{Co_2MnSi}$ as a robust, scalable platform towards bias-field-free nonlinear half-metal magnonics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有完美晶体结构的半金属Heusler化合物Co₂MnSi中的线性和非线性自旋波动力学，证明其本征立方各向异性可抑制非线性不稳定性、抵消形状退磁效应，结合超低吉尔伯特阻尼和半金属特性，为无偏置场非线性半金属磁子学提供了鲁棒可扩展平台。
AI.motivation: Co₂MnSi具有100%自旋极化和超低阻尼等理想特性，但其优异性能高度依赖晶体结构有序性。目前纳米器件的制备面临挑战，材料参数对非线性自旋波动力学的影响尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 在横向磁化的Co₂MnSi波导中研究线性和非线性自旋波动力学；生长外延L2₁有序薄膜；测量磁晶各向异性、自旋波色散关系及非线性不稳定性阈值。
AI.result: 1) L2₁有序Co₂MnSi表现出包含一阶和二阶贡献的本征立方各向异性，稳定磁化沿⟨110⟩方向；2) 未受影响的晶体结构使图案化结构中的磁性能得以保持；3) 磁晶各向异性重塑自旋波色散，实现覆盖数GHz的一阶非线性不稳定性抑制范围（甚至零偏置场下）；4) 磁晶各向异性可抵消形状退磁效应，在达蒙-埃什巴赫几何中实现稳定的低偏置场操作。
AI.conclusion: 结合已验证的半金属特性和超低吉尔伯特阻尼，本研究确立了Co₂MnSi作为面向无偏置场非线性半金属磁子学的鲁棒、可扩展平台。

title: Fast Tensor Network Imaginary Time Evolution by Implicit Stepping on Logarithmic Grids
summary: We present a new method for the efficient imaginary time evolution of quantum many-body wavefunctions represented by matrix product states (MPS). We first show that logarithmic time grids are sufficient to resolve long imaginary time dynamics, yielding an exponential reduction in the number of time steps compared with standard approaches. We then show that A-stable implicit time-stepping methods for ordinary differential equations allow stable propagation for any time step size. The resulting scheme requires only matrix-vector products and linear solves, standard operations in the MPS toolbox. We validate our approach with two examples: a Heisenberg spin chain, which we use to demonstrate a speedup of several orders of magnitude over the standard time-dependent variational principle method with uniform time steps, and a single-site Anderson impurity model with a metallic bath, for which propagation to large imaginary times allows one to observe the exponential dependence of the Kondo temperature on the interaction strength.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于矩阵乘积态的高效虚时演化方法，利用对数时间网格和A-稳定隐式时间步进，大幅减少时间步数并保证稳定性，在Heisenberg自旋链和Anderson杂质模型中实现了数量级的加速。
AI.motivation: 标准虚时演化方法（如均匀时间步长的含时变分原理）计算成本高，需要大量时间步才能达到长虚时演化，效率低下。
AI.method: 1) 采用对数时间网格，指数级减少时间步数；2) 使用A-稳定隐式时间步进方法（任意步长下稳定）；3) 仅需矩阵-向量乘积和线性求解，这些是MPS的标准操作。
AI.result: 在Heisenberg自旋链中，相比标准TVP方法实现了多个数量级的加速；在单杂质Anderson模型中，成功观测到Kondo温度随相互作用强度的指数依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 对数时间网格+隐式稳定步进能高效、准确地实现长虚时MPS演化，适用于强关联量子多体系统。

title: Role of Characteristic Length Scale in Interface Graphitization-Induced Wear Resistance of Diamond and Amorphous Carbon
summary: The evolution of interfacial atomic structures critically influences the friction and wear behavior of carbon-based materials. However, how the characteristic length scale of friction-induced sp\textsuperscript{2} reconstruction governs macroscopic wear remains poorly understood, particularly for diamond and amorphous carbon where the interfacial graphitization modes differ fundamentally. In this work, we develop a machine learning potential for these carbon systems and investigate the structural evolution at interfaces in both diamond/diamond and amorphous/amorphous carbon systems using molecular dynamics simulations. Our results reveal distinct atomic-scale characteristics of graphitization at the two interfaces. Diamond interfaces develop a laterally continuous sp\textsuperscript{2} reconstruction layer with a characteristic length of 30--45~Å, while amorphous carbon interfaces form only fully isolated sp\textsuperscript{2} patches of 8--12~Å. This disparity in characteristic length scale determines the density of weakly bonded interfacial atoms left outside the reconstruction layer, thereby directly dictating the macroscopic wear rate. Based on these insights, we propose a strategy to regulate friction-induced graphitization in diamond coatings by protecting specific crystallographic orientations, such as the (111) close-packed planes. This work bridges the gap between atomic-scale interfacial structure and macroscopic tribological performance, offering mechanistic guidelines for the rational design of wear-resistant carbon-based coatings.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了碳体系的机器学习势函数，通过分子动力学模拟揭示了金刚石和非晶碳界面在摩擦诱导下石墨化的特征长度差异（金刚石30-45Å连续层 vs 非晶碳8-12Å孤立斑块），并建立了原子尺度界面结构与宏观磨损性能之间的关联，提出了通过保护特定晶面来调控摩擦诱导石墨化的策略。
AI.motivation: 摩擦诱导的sp²重构特征长度如何决定宏观磨损行为尚不清楚，特别是金刚石和非晶碳的界面石墨化模式存在根本差异，理解这一机制对设计耐磨碳基涂层至关重要。
AI.method: 开发了适用于金刚石和非晶碳体系的机器学习势函数，利用分子动力学模拟研究金刚石/金刚石和非晶碳/非晶碳两种界面的摩擦诱导结构演化。
AI.result: 金刚石界面形成横向连续的sp²重构层（特征长度30-45Å），而非晶碳界面仅形成完全孤立的sp²斑块（8-12Å）。这种特征长度差异决定了重构层外弱键合界面原子的密度，进而直接影响宏观磨损率。
AI.conclusion: 提出了通过保护特定晶面取向（如(111)密排面）来调控金刚石涂层中摩擦诱导石墨化的策略，桥接了原子尺度界面结构与宏观摩擦学性能之间的鸿沟，为理性设计耐磨碳基涂层提供了机理指导。

title: Ferroelectric-tunable quantum nonlinearity of chiral Bloch electrons in a moiré system
comment: 24 pages, 10 figures, 1 table. Zitian Pan and Jundong Zhu, both authors contribute equally. Nano Letters (in Press)
summary: Sliding ferroelectricity in van der Waals materials shows great potential for designing robust memory devices. However, its thermodynamic behaviors and the coupling with certain quantum effects remain largely unexplored. Here, we demonstrate ferroelectric control over quantum nonlinear transport in a hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) encapsulated twisted double-bilayer graphene moiré heterostructure. The ferroelectricity is attributed to the presence of rhombohedral stacking in the top hBN, confirmed by both electrical transport and optical second harmonic generation (SHG) measurements. Remarkably, the polarization magnitude remains temperature-independent across 1.7-200 K, while nucleation time exhibits thermally activated behavior, decreasing with increasing temperature. Furthermore, we demonstrate a ferroelectric-switchable nonlinear Hall effect, attributed to the chiral scattering induced by Berry curvature, with outstanding fatigue-resistant and nonvolatility, demonstrating direct coupling between sliding ferroelectricity and quantum geometric properties. Our results establish sliding ferroelectrics as a platform for exploring electrically programmable Berry curvature physics.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了在六方氮化硼(hBN)封装的扭转双层石墨烯莫尔异质结中，通过滑动铁电性实现对量子非线性输运的铁电控制，发现了温度无关的极化强度和 thermally activated 的成核行为，并实现了可铁电切换的非线性霍尔效应，建立了滑动铁电性与贝里曲率量子几何特性之间的直接耦合。
AI.motivation: 滑动铁电性在范德华材料中展现出设计鲁棒存储器的巨大潜力，但其热力学行为以及与某些量子效应的耦合尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 在hBN封装的扭转双双层石墨烯莫尔异质结中，通过电输运和光学二次谐波(SHG)测量确认顶部hBN中的菱方堆叠导致的铁电性，研究极化强度、成核时间与温度的依赖关系，并测量非线性霍尔效应。
AI.result: 极化强度在1.7-200K范围内与温度无关；成核时间表现出热激活行为（随温度升高而减小）；实现了具有优异抗疲劳性和非易失性的铁电可切换非线性霍尔效应。
AI.conclusion: 滑动铁电体可作为探索电可编程贝里曲率物理的平台，建立了滑动铁电性与量子几何特性之间的直接耦合。

title: Many-Body Non-Hermitian Physics in the Generalized Brillouin Zone
summary:
The breakdown of conventional bulk-boundary correspondence (BBC) in
  non-Hermitian system can be resolved by the generalized Brillouin
  zone (GBZ) theory. However, extending the GBZ theory to interacting
  many-body systems remains an open problem. Here, we consider an
  interacting non-Hermitian model characterized by a circular GBZ. We
  show that, based on a GBZ transformation, a quasi-reciprocal
  many-body Hamiltonian can be constructed which, under periodic
  boundary conditions (PBC), captures the physics of the original
  non-Hermitian model under open boundary conditions (OBC). Using
  exact diagonalization (ED), we determine the phase diagram for the
  quasi-reciprocal many-body Hamiltonian by computing the Zak phase
  and the structure factor of the charge-density-wave (CDW) phase. We
  further investigate the entanglement properties and find that the
  degeneracy of the low-lying entanglement spectrum characterizes each
  phase in the phase diagram. These findings demonstrate that the
  topological properties in interacting non-Hermitian system is encoded in
  the entanglement spectrum of the quasi-reciprocal model. Our work
  establishes a route to studying many-body non-Hermitian physics
  within the GBZ formalism.

AI.tldr: 本文通过广义布里渊区（GBZ）变换，将非厄米相互作用系统映射为准互易多体模型，并利用精确对角化计算Zak相和CDW结构因子，揭示了拓扑性质编码在准互易模型的纠缠谱中。
AI.motivation: 非厄米系统中传统的体-边对应破缺可通过GBZ理论解决，但将GBZ理论推广到相互作用多体系统仍是一个开放难题。
AI.method: 基于GBZ变换构建准互易多体哈密顿量，使PBC下的准互易模型捕获原非厄米模型OBC下的物理；利用精确对角化（ED）计算Zak相位和CDW相的结构因子；分析纠缠谱的低能简并性来表征各相。
AI.result: 确定了准互易多体模型的相图；发现低能纠缠谱的简并性能够表征相图中的各个相；证明了相互作用非厄米系统的拓扑性质编码在准互易模型的纠缠谱中。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了在GBZ形式下研究多体非厄米物理的路径，为非厄米相互作用系统的拓扑性质研究提供了新方法。

title: The pseudogap in high-$T_c$ superconductors from SU(2) gauge symmetry and dynamic correlation effects
summary: We consider the spectral properties of the two-dimensional Hubbard model, describing the electronic properties of high-$T_c$ compounds, within the SU(2) gauge theory, which assumes the separation of electronic degrees of freedom into those of spinon and chargon subsystems. We use the dynamic mean-field theory (DMFT) approach to describe magnetic long-range order in the chargon subsystem while also treating spinon fluctuations on top of this state. We show that DMFT supplemented by long-wavelength magnetic fluctuations is essential for describing the asymmetry in the damping between the inner and outer regions of the hole pockets and the resulting formation of Fermi arcs in the underdoped regime, especially at low hole doping. The underlying hole pockets in the chargon subsystem can be associated with those observed in quantum oscillation measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文利用SU(2)规范理论和动态平均场理论（DMFT）研究二维Hubbard模型，发现DMFT结合长波磁涨落对描述欠掺杂区空穴袋内外区域阻尼不对称性和费米弧的形成至关重要，且空穴袋与量子振荡测量结果一致。
AI.motivation: 理解高温超导化合物中电子特性的谱学性质，特别是欠掺杂区域中费米弧的形成机制以及空穴袋的谱权重不对称性问题。
AI.method: 采用SU(2)规范理论将电子自由度分离为自旋子和电荷子子系统，并使用动态平均场理论（DMFT）描述电荷子子系统中的磁长程有序，同时处理该状态之上的自旋子涨落。
AI.result: 发现DMFT结合长波磁涨落是描述空穴袋内外区域阻尼不对称性以及欠掺杂区费米弧形成的关键因素，尤其适用于低空穴掺杂情形。
AI.conclusion: 电荷子子系统中的空穴袋可与量子振荡测量中观测到的结果相关联，说明该理论框架能够有效解释高温超导欠掺杂区的关键电子谱学现象。

title: Early Experiments on Macroscopic Quantum Tunneling
summary: Before conclusive evidence of Macroscopic Quantum Tunneling, MQT, was published by Clarke, Devoret and Martinis in 1985, several other groups reported experimental results interpreted as MQT. The first, in chronological order, was in 1980 based on studies done at Leiden University in 1979. This paper looks back at these experiments on low capacitance Niobium point contacts in an rf SQUID, radio-frequency Superconducting Quantum Interference Device, configuration at temperatures between 1 and 4.2 K. The research was inspired by the theoretical predictions by Ivanchenko and Zilberman in 1969 on MQT in current-biased Josephson junctions and by Leggett in 1978 on MQT in closed loops with a superconducting weak link.

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了1980年莱顿大学在宏观量子隧穿（MQT）方面的早期实验研究，这些实验基于1979年对低电容铌点接触射频SQUID的研究，温度范围为1-4.2K，受Ivanchenko & Zilberman（1969）和Leggett（1978）的理论启发。
AI.motivation: 在Clarke等人于1985年发表MQT的确凿证据之前，已有多个研究团队报告了被解释为MQT的实验结果。本文旨在回顾最早（1980年）的这类实验，重新审视其历史意义。
AI.method: 对1979年在莱顿大学进行的低电容铌点接触射频SQUID实验进行回顾性分析，实验温度范围为1至4.2K。
AI.result: 该研究是MQT实验探索的早期尝试，其灵感来源于Ivanchenko & Zilberman（1969）关于电流偏置约瑟夫森结MQT的理论预测，以及Leggett（1978）关于含超导弱连接闭合环路中MQT的理论。
AI.conclusion: 这篇历史回顾性论文确认了1980年莱顿大学的实验是MQT研究史上最早被报道的实验尝试，为后续1985年Clarke等人的决定性实验奠定了基础。

title: Quantum annealing for materials
summary:
Finding the global minimum of a potential energy surface is a fundamental challenge in materials science, with applications ranging from protein folding to cluster physics and, more broadly, to systems in which the number of (meta)stable configurations grows prohibitively large. In recent decades, quantum annealing (QA) has emerged as a promising global optimization strategy, exploiting quantum fluctuations in contrast to the thermal fluctuations that drive its classical counterpart.
  Here, we introduce a novel implementation of QA based on path-integral molecular dynamics, an efficient and well-established framework for sampling the quantum nuclear density without the need to manipulate many-body wavefunctions explicitly. While retaining the flexibility and simplicity of molecular dynamics simulations, this quantum-annealing protocol delivers strong performance across a wide range of atomic systems, simulated by either empirical force fields or machine-learning interatomic potentials. The method can be used either as a global optimizer of the potential-energy surface, or as a quantum-informed structure-search strategy in which nuclear quantum effects are included directly in the optimization workflow -- a feature particularly relevant for materials such as high-pressure hydrides.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于路径积分分子动力学的新型量子退火实现方法，既能作为势能面的全局优化器，也能将核量子效应纳入结构搜索流程，在多种原子体系（包括经验力场和机器学习势）上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 寻找势能面的全局最小值是材料科学中的基本挑战（如蛋白质折叠、团簇物理等），量子退火作为一种有前景的全局优化策略，但现有实现方式复杂，需要更高效且易于使用的框架。
AI.method: 基于路径积分分子动力学（PIMD）实现量子退火，无需显式操作多体波函数，保留了分子动力学模拟的灵活性和简洁性，可适配经验力场或机器学习原子间势。
AI.result: 该方法在多种原子体系上表现出强劲性能，既能作为势能面全局优化器，也能作为量子信息结构搜索策略，特别适用于高压氢化物等材料。
AI.conclusion: 提出的PIMD量子退火框架兼具效率与普适性，为复杂体系的结构优化和量子效应纳入提供了实用工具。

title: Mechanochemical Nano-Writing of an Atomically Thin Metal
summary: Mechanical energy accelerates many physicochemical processes, including materials syntheses that are hard to produce with thermal energy alone. However, physical understanding connecting applied mechanical forces with internal stresses and ensuing reaction mechanisms is lacking. Here we demonstrate mechanical force-enabled synthesis and nanoscale patterning to metallize a two-dimensional (2D) material, producing an atomically-thin superconducting material. Localized force applied by atomic force microscope tips to van der Waals (vdW) encapsulated stacks of 2D bilayer MoTe2 and adjacent source Pd guides 2D Pd7MoTe2 growth with 50 nm lateral resolution. Force accelerates reaction kinetics exponentially per Eyring's stress-assisted thermal activation model, reducing synthesis temperatures from ~200 °C to near-room temperature. Finite element simulations, density functional theory, and ab-initio grand canonical Monte Carlo calculations show that tip-induced compression facilitates Pd chemisorption to tensile-strained MoTe2 that converts to uniform Pd7MoTe2. This demonstrates a new, generalizable paradigm for nanoscale synthesis of quantum materials, and high-precision engineering of superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了利用原子力显微镜尖端施加机械力，在二维材料MoTe2上实现纳米尺度的Pd7MoTe2超导材料合成与图形化，将合成温度从约200°C降至近室温，并揭示了应力辅助热激活的反应动力学机制。
AI.motivation: 机械力能加速许多物理化学过程，包括热力难以实现的材料合成，但连接外加机械力、内部应力与反应机理的物理理解尚缺乏。
AI.method: 利用AFM尖端施加局域力于vdW封装的2D双层MoTe2与Pd源堆叠结构，结合有限元模拟、DFT和从头算巨正则蒙特卡洛计算，研究应力辅助热激活模型下的反应动力学。
AI.result: 实现了50 nm横向分辨率的2D Pd7MoTe2生长；力使反应温度从~200°C降至近室温；揭示了尖端压缩促进Pd化学吸附到拉伸应变MoTe2上并转化为均匀Pd7MoTe2的机制。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为量子材料的纳米尺度合成和超导性的高精度工程化提供了新的通用范式。

title: Criticality and Quench Dynamics at the Anderson Transition of a Chern Insulator
summary: We study the critical properties of the topological Anderson phase transition in a strongly disordered Chern insulator, separating the topological phase from a trivial Anderson insulator. We show that the transition is characterized by a non-zero electrical conductance and by the emergence of a critical length scale in the real-space profile of the local Chern marker. From this, we extract the correlation-length and the dynamical critical exponents, which are consistent with those of non-interacting models of the integer quantum Hall effect. We then ramp the disorder strength across the transition and study the ensuing dynamics. In contrast to clean topological systems, we find that the excitation density does not follow the Kibble-Zurek scaling. The non-equilibrium length scale associated with the local Chern marker is decoupled from the generation of excitations. For studied system sizes, we find it to be close to the Kibble-Zurek prediction for the topological-to-trivial quench, while it deviates from it for the reverse direction.

AI.tldr: 研究强无序陈绝缘体中拓扑安德森相变的临界性质，发现转变伴随非零电导和局域陈标记的临界长度尺度，提取的临界指数与整数量子霍尔效应一致；但非平衡动力学中激发密度不遵循Kibble-Zurek标度，局域陈标记的非平衡长度尺度与激发产生解耦。
AI.motivation: 探索强无序拓扑体系中拓扑安德森相变（从拓扑相到平凡安德森绝缘体）的临界性质及非平衡动力学行为，特别是验证Kibble-Zurek机制是否适用于无序拓扑相变。
AI.method: 通过数值研究强无序陈绝缘体模型，计算电导、局域陈标记的实空间分布来提取关联长度和动力学临界指数；通过阶跃改变无序强度研究非平衡动力学，分析激发密度和局域陈标记相关的非平衡长度尺度。
AI.result: 临界指数与整数量子霍尔效应的非相互作用模型一致；激发密度不遵循Kibble-Zurek标度；局域陈标记的非平衡长度尺度在拓扑→平凡淬火中接近Kibble-Zurek预言，但在反向淬火中存在偏差。
AI.conclusion: 无序拓扑相变的平衡临界性质与干净体系一致，但非平衡动力学中局域陈标记与激发产生解耦，Kibble-Zurek机制不直接适用，揭示了无序对拓扑相变动力学的重要影响。

title: Microscopic derivation of the microstretch theory for carbon nanotubes
summary: Twisted carbon nanotubes support phonons involving not only torsion, naturally associated with microrotation, but also radial breathing, which requires a scalar stretch degree of freedom. We derive an effective microstretch theory for these modes starting from nonlinear elasticity on a cylindrical surface. By linearizing the equation of motion around a uniformly twisted equilibrium configuration, we obtain the dynamical matrix for the twisting, longitudinal, and radial-breathing modes. This matrix coincides with that of a one-dimensional microstretch theory, and the corresponding elastic constants are expressed in terms of the Lamé constants, the nanotube radius, and the twist rate. The twist generates chiral couplings in the effective theory, which hybridize the three modes and open an anticrossing in the phonon dispersion. These results provide a microscopic basis for the microstretch description of phonons in twisted carbon nanotubes and clarify how structural chirality enters the effective couplings.

AI.tldr: 本文从非线性弹性理论出发，推导了扭曲碳纳米管中扭转、纵向和径向呼吸三种声子模式的有效微拉伸理论，揭示了扭曲引起的对称性破缺如何产生手性耦合，使三种模式杂化并在色散中出现反交叉。
AI.motivation: 扭曲碳纳米管中存在扭转（与微转动相关）和径向呼吸（需要标量拉伸自由度）两种特殊声子模式，然而现有理论缺乏对这些模式统一的微拉伸描述，作者希望为这两种模式建立有效的微拉伸理论框架。
AI.method: 从圆柱面上的非线性弹性理论出发，在均匀扭曲平衡构型附近线性化运动方程，得到扭转、纵向和径向呼吸模式的动力学矩阵，并将弹性常数表示为Lame常数、纳米管半径和扭曲率的函数。
AI.result: 该动力学矩阵与一维微拉伸理论的形式一致；扭曲产生了手性耦合，使三种模式发生杂化，并在声子色散中打开一个反交叉（anticrossing）带隙。
AI.conclusion: 为扭曲碳纳米管中声子的微拉伸描述提供了微观基础，阐明了结构手性如何进入有效耦合项。

title: 20 Second Parity Lifetime in an InAs--Pb Tetron Device
summary: A central promise of topological quantum computing is that increasing the excitation gap improves device performance significantly. Here, we experimentally validate this principle in an InAs--Pb tetron device via interferometric single-shot parity measurements. By replacing aluminum with the higher-gap superconductor lead in our superconductor-semiconductor hybrid devices, we have improved the robustness of our topological phase. In addition, to enable fast and precise bring-up at scale, we have developed an rf measurement technique that resolves low-energy wire-end states and directly measures their energy splitting with $μ\text{eV}$ precision. We employ this technique to bring up a device in a multi-tetron array and perform parity measurements of one of the tetron's hybrid nanowires (NWs). By controllably switching the wire parity, we observe $h/2e$-periodic bimodal shifts in the quantum capacitance of a quantum dot coupled to the hybrid nanowire in an interference loop. Further time-resolved measurements reveal a characteristic parity switching time of $\sim 20$ s with some instances reaching minute-scale. Such extremely long parity lifetimes are orders of magnitude longer than typical qubit operation times, which are on the order of $μ\text{s}$. Finally, we discuss potential implications for the fidelity of Pauli measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文在InAs-Pb tetron器件中通过干涉测量单次宇称，实验验证了提高激发隙可显著提升拓扑量子计算性能。采用高隙超导体铅替代铝增强了拓扑相鲁棒性，并开发了射频测量技术实现μeV精度的低能线端态能量分裂测量。观测到h/2e周期双模量子电容偏移，特征宇称翻转时间约20秒，远长于典型量子比特操作时间（μs量级），讨论了Pauli测量保真度的潜在影响。
AI.motivation: 验证拓扑量子计算的核心承诺——增大激发隙可提升器件性能，并开发快速精确的测量技术以实现多tetron阵列的规模化调控。
AI.method: 使用高隙超导体铅替代铝制造InAs-Pb tetron器件；开发射频测量技术以μeV精度解析低能线端态能量分裂；在干涉环路中通过量子点量子电容测量观测宇称切换。
AI.result: 观察到h/2e周期的双模量子电容偏移；特征宇称翻转时间约20秒，部分达分钟级；宇称寿命比典型量子比特操作时间（μs）长数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 增大激发隙确实显著提升了拓扑相鲁棒性；极长的宇称寿命为高保真度Pauli测量提供了有利条件，对拓扑量子计算的规模化实现具有重要启示。

title: Magnetic field effects on spin-split band and magnon transport in altermagnets and emergent compensated ferrimagnets
summary: In altermagnets and fully compensated ferrimagnets, not only the electron band but also the magnon band exhibits spin splitting without net magnetization, which enables thermal activation of the magnon spin current. Here, we theoretically investigate magnetic field effects on the magnon properties of these antiferromagnets in the presence of a weak easy-axis anisotropy which makes the collinear states robust against the magnetic field. For the altermagnet and compensated ferrimagnet, we analyze a 2 sublattice order in the $J_1$-$J_2$-$J_2^\prime$ model on the square lattice and a triple-${\bf Q}$ 12-sublattice order in the $J_1$-$J_3$ model on the kagome lattice, respectively, each accompanied by $d$-wave and $s$-wave spin splitting at zero field. It is shown that for positive (negative) magnetic field $H$ whose energy scale is smaller than the anisotropy gap, the up- and down-spin magnon bands are shifted to lower (higher) and higher (lower) energies, respectively, similarly to the Zeeman coupling in electron systems. In the altermagnet, with increasing field, the $d$-wave splitting tends to be deformed into the $s$-wave one, which is reflected as the change in the direction of the spin current generated by thermal gradient. In the compensated ferrimagnet, the $s$-wave nature, i.e., the population imbalance between the up- and down-spin magnons at $H=0$, results in an asymmetric field dependence of the longitudinal spin and thermal conductivities.

AI.tldr: 本文理论研究了弱易轴各向异性反铁磁体中磁场对交替磁体（altermagnet）和补偿亚铁磁体（compensated ferrimagnet）中磁子性质的影响，揭示了磁场下自旋劈裂的形变与输运行为的变化。
AI.motivation: 在交替磁体和补偿亚铁磁体中，无净磁化下磁子带也会发生自旋劈裂，从而产生磁子自旋流的热激活。本文旨在理论探究外加磁场如何影响这些反铁磁体系的磁子性质，特别是弱易轴各向异性存在时的行为。
AI.method: 基于$J_1$-$J_2$-$J_2^\prime$模型的方格子上2子格序（交替磁体）和$J_1$-$J_3$模型的kagome晶格上12子格三Q序（补偿亚铁磁体），分别对应零场下的$d$波和$s$波自旋劈裂，理论分析了磁场（能量尺度小于各向异性能隙）下的磁子能带变化。
AI.result: (1) 正(负)磁场下，上自旋和下自旋磁子带分别向低(高)能和高(低)能移动，类似电子系统的塞曼耦合；(2) 交替磁体中，随磁场增强，$d$波劈裂逐渐向$s$波劈裂变形，表现为热梯度产生自旋流方向的改变；(3) 补偿亚铁磁体中，零场下的$s$波性质（上下自旋磁子布居不平衡）导致纵向自旋和热导率呈现非对称的磁场依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 磁场可以有效调控交替磁体和补偿亚铁磁体中的磁子自旋劈裂形态及自旋输运特性，为磁子自旋流的热操控提供理论依据。

title: Reversible Superdense Ordering of Tetragonal Lithium in a Layered Material
summary: Understanding lithium (Li) ordering and dynamics is foundational in energy storage. X-ray based experimental methods do not simultaneously provide atomic structure information together with chemical composition and local bonding information for lithium in solids. Here we employ scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) and combine imaging, spectroscopy, and diffraction within a single experiment, to observe, in situ, an all-solid-state electrochemical cell. By integrating multimodal STEM with other complementary techniques, we report a complete mapping of lithium intercalation in a layered system, LaTe3. We identify three ordered phases of LixLaTe3 with x ranging from 1/3 to 3 with in-plane strain of up to 5%. At a very high lithium concentration of Li3LaTe3, we discover an unexpected three-layer, superdense lithium phase with tetragonal symmetry occupying the van der Waals gap. This represents a new Li phase that is reversible. Our multimodal approach thus enables complete tracking of lithium ordering and dynamics, important for next-generation energy storage applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过多模态扫描透射电子显微镜（STEM）结合成像、光谱和衍射技术，在原子尺度上完整绘制了锂在层状材料LaTe3中的嵌入过程，发现了三种有序相和一种新的三层超密锂相结构。
AI.motivation: X射线基实验方法无法同时提供固体中锂的原子结构信息、化学组成和局部键合信息，因此需要一种能够同步获取这些信息的方法来理解锂的排序和动力学。
AI.method: 在单一实验中采用扫描透射电子显微镜（STEM），结合成像、光谱和衍射技术，对全固态电化学电池进行原位观测，并整合多模态STEM与其他互补技术。
AI.result: 在LixLaTe3中识别出三种有序相（x从1/3到3），面内应变达5%；在极高锂浓度Li3LaTe3中发现了一种具有四方对称性、占据范德华间隙的三层超密锂相，且该新相是可逆的。
AI.conclusion: 多模态方法实现了对锂排序和动力学的完整追踪，对下一代储能应用具有重要意义。

title: Emergent Hall viscosity in the integer quantum Hall phases of graphene-like systems
summary: We explicitly distinguish Hall viscosity as defined relative to the strain field vs. relative to an emergent vielbein or metric field and discuss it for graphene-like systems. Aside from the gravitational or vielbein/metric related ``geometric'' Hall viscosity prevailing throughout the literature, a contribution proportional to the Hall conductivity, the ``electronic'' Hall viscosity, due to the emergent strain induced gauge field exists. We unify both contributions within the ``emergent'' Hall viscosity, determine it explicitly for graphene in the semimetal and Semenoff semiconducting phases for integer quantum Hall states and in the latter case compare it to its non-relativistic limit. Under these circumstances two topological invariants enter the emergent Hall viscosity in the presence of translational and rotational symmetry which we derive in the Green function representation of Wigner-Weyl calculus. We discuss experimental perspectives for extracting the emergent Hall viscosity.

AI.tldr: 本文区分了两种霍尔粘度：传统的“几何”霍尔粘度（与度规相关）和“电子”霍尔粘度（与应变诱导规范场相关），并将它们统一为“涌现”霍尔粘度。以石墨烯体系为例，在整数量子霍尔态下推导了该粘度的表达式，并讨论了其实验观测前景。
AI.motivation: 现有文献对霍尔粘度的定义存在歧义——一种基于应变场，另一种基于涌现的 vielbein 或度规场。作者希望明确区分这两种定义，并在石墨烯系统中将它们统一起来，同时揭示其拓扑本质。
AI.method: 采用格林函数与Wigner-Weyl微积分的形式，在平移和旋转对称性存在的条件下推导涌现霍尔粘度中的两个拓扑不变量；针对石墨烯的半金属相和Semenoff半导体相中的整数量子霍尔态进行具体计算，并与非相对论极限对比。
AI.result: 发现“电子”霍尔粘度与霍尔电导率成比例，源于应变诱导的规范场；而“几何”霍尔粘度源于度规场。两者统一为“涌现”霍尔粘度，并由两个拓扑不变量控制。在Semenoff相中给出了该粘度的显式表达式及其非相对论极限。
AI.conclusion: 明确了霍尔粘度的双重来源及其统一框架，揭示了其拓扑本质，并为实验提取涌现霍尔粘度提供了理论指导。

title: Mott transition of photons: quantum Monte Carlo study of Gross-Neveu criticality in a cavity
summary: The Hubbard model on the honeycomb lattice is a pristine realisation of a semimetal-to-insulator Mott transition belonging to the Gross-Neveu O(3) universality class. We couple this system to a single linearly polarised cavity photon mode. The light-matter coupling is such that the photon number remains an intensive quantity as is the case for an empty cavity. For this interacting light-matter model, we formulate a negative-sign-free fermion quantum Monte Carlo algorithm that allows for bias-free results on finite system sizes. Our numerical results show that the coupling to the cavity is irrelevant at criticality, even at strong electron-photon coupling. On the other hand, we observe, and show analytically, that the photon spectral function couples to the optical conductivity of the electronic system. The cavity photons thereby undergo a Mott transition, and the photon spectral function acts as a contact-free non-invasive probe for Mott criticality.

AI.tldr: 本文研究蜂窝晶格Hubbard模型耦合到单个线性偏振腔光子模的系统。通过无符号问题的费米子量子蒙特卡洛算法，发现腔耦合在临界点无关，但光子谱函数可作为无接触非侵入式探针探测Mott临界性。
AI.motivation: 探索光腔中的光-物质耦合如何影响蜂窝晶格上Hubbard模型的半金属-绝缘体Mott相变，特别是腔光子是否能在强耦合下改变临界行为，以及能否利用光子作为探测手段。
AI.method: 提出了无负符号问题的费米子量子蒙特卡洛算法；并结合解析分析研究光-物质耦合系统在有限尺寸下的无偏数值结果。
AI.result: 腔耦合在临界点处是无关的（irrelevant），即使强电子-光子耦合也不改变Mott相变的Gross-Neveu O(3)普适类；但光子谱函数耦合到电子系统的光导率，光子本身经历Mott相变。
AI.conclusion: 腔光子可作为无接触非侵入式探针，通过其谱函数探测Mott临界性，为实验上研究光腔中的强关联电子系统提供了新方法。

title: Spin-chiral electron-phonon coupling in metallic strontium titanate
summary: Electron-phonon coupling (EPC) - the interaction between conduction electrons and quantized atomic vibrations - plays a central role in condensed matter physics and determines some of the most important properties of materials, such as electrical resistivity and superconductivity. Conventionally, EPC is assumed to be induced by the ionic electrostatic background, and electronic spin plays no role in the process. In stark contrast with this view, here we uncover a direct spin-mediated coupling mechanism between electrons and transverse polar phonons in a metal. Using far-infrared light absorption measurements of the model system SrTiO$_3$ in a magnetic field, we observe a strong spin-mediated EPC that is quantitatively consistent with recent theoretical predictions, and that generates chiral phonon modes with large effective magnetic moments. The extracted coupling strength is in good agreement with ab initio estimates and sufficiently high to explain superconductivity in SrTiO$_3$, thereby resolving a long-standing conundrum.
