Spin-chiral EPC should generically appear in all metals with polar phonons, and the present work could be of relevance to spintronics applications and to uncovering the origins of superconductivity in layered materials, metals with Dirac points in their electronic dispersions, and nearly ferroelectric superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了一种由自旋介导的电子-声子耦合新机制，通过SrTiO₃的太赫兹光吸收实验证实了该机制可产生具有大有效磁矩的手性声子模式，并解释了其超导起源。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为电子-声子耦合由离子静电背景诱导，自旋不参与该过程。本文旨在挑战这一传统认知，揭示自旋介导的电子-声子耦合机制的存在。
AI.method: 以SrTiO₃为模型体系，在磁场下进行远红外光吸收测量，结合理论预测和第一性原理估算，验证自旋介导的电子-声子耦合。
AI.result: 观察到强自旋介导的电子-声子耦合，与理论预测定量一致；产生了具有大有效磁矩的手性声子模式；提取的耦合强度与第一性原理估算吻合，足以解释SrTiO₃的超导性。
AI.conclusion: 自旋手性电子-声子耦合应普遍存在于所有具有极性声子的金属中，对自旋电子学应用以及理解层状材料、狄拉克点金属、近铁电超导体中的超导起源具有重要意义。

title: Molecular neutron spectroscopy techniques applied to ceramics $α$-SiC and $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$
summary: Neutron spectroscopy is a powerful technique for determining the vibrational states of matter. Instruments with fixed geometry may measure inelastic scattering at a limited set of angles, producing a 1-D spectrum $S(ω)$. Such measurements are usually simulated in a DOS-like semi-analytic incoherent approximation, well-established for study of bending/stretching modes in molecular crystals. In this work we empirically test the simulation method for two ceramics with industrial electronic applications that act as "worst-case" systems. The phonon scattering from $α$-SiC and $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ is coherent, depends on momentum transfer $Q$ and sits in frequencies below the typical "fingerprint" range of molecular spectroscopy. Inelastic neutron-scattering measurements of powders were performed with two contrasting spectrometers at cryogenic and elevated temperatures, and simulations performed using a variety of density-functional approximations. We find that for 1-D powder spectra from a compact instrument, the approximate simulations are easily comparable with experimental spectra and give similar results to a more computationally-intensive numerical sampling of the coherent spectrum. Given the success with these systems, the approximate method appears to be suitable for modelling inelastic neutron scattering by harmonic phonons of almost any powder sample with this technique. When a $Q$-resolved instrument is used to collect the 2-D dynamical structure factor $S(Q,ω)$, numerical averaging is still required to capture phonon features. Our simulations of inelastic scattering from $α$-SiC in the 6H polytype using the PBEsol functional gave good agreement with the experiments. By contrast, the RSCAN functional gave the best agreement with the measured spectra of $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ and is recommended for future work on the lattice dynamics of this material.

AI.tldr: 本文测试了一种用于模拟粉末样品非弹性中子散射1D光谱的半解析非相干近似方法，以α-SiC和β-Ga₂O₃两种工业陶瓷作为“最坏情况”体系。结果表明，该方法对于1D光谱与实验吻合良好，与计算量更大的相干数值采样结果相似；但对于2D动态结构因子S(Q,ω)仍需数值平均。同时发现PBEsol泛函适用于6H-SiC，而RSCAN泛函更适于β-Ga₂O₃。
AI.motivation: 传统中子光谱模拟采用DOS-like半解析非相干近似，在处理弯曲/伸缩模式时效果良好，但该方法是否适用于频率较低、相干散射显著、依赖动量转移Q的陶瓷材料（如α-SiC和β-Ga₂O₃）尚未得到充分验证。
AI.method: 对α-SiC和β-Ga₂O₃粉末进行非弹性中子散射实验，使用两种不同几何结构的光谱仪在低温和高温下测量；同时采用多种密度泛函近似（PBEsol、RSCAN等）进行模拟，对比近似方法（1D半解析非相干近似）与精确方法（数值采样相干谱）的结果。
AI.result: 1D光谱中，近似模拟与实验谱容易比较，且与数值采样的相干谱结果相似；对于2D S(Q,ω)则需要数值平均。PBEsol泛函与6H-SiC实验吻合良好，RSCAN泛函则与β-Ga₂O₃光谱最佳匹配。
AI.conclusion: 该近似方法适用于几乎所有粉末样品的谐波声子非弹性中子散射1D光谱建模；推荐RSCAN泛函用于β-Ga₂O₃晶格动力学研究。

title: The Emergence of Photonic Crystalline Order and Time-Series Dynamics in NaCl Droplet Deposition
summary: Crystallization during droplet evaporation gives rise to complex, self-organized structures, yet the mechanisms underlying the emergence of ordered functional phases remain poorly understood. In this study, we present a comprehensive, multi-scale investigation into the crystallization dynamics of NaCl during droplet evaporation on a germanium (001) substrate, relevant for its IR applications. Through systematic microscopic characterization, we identify the formation of diverse microstructures, including 1D photonic crystal nanostructures formed within hybrid crystal-glass photonic system. To enable quantitative comparison across experimental conditions, we introduce the NaCl equivalent height as a unified metric to describe and classify the evolution of crystalline morphology. Our results reveal that diffusion anisotropy, rather than growth kinetics, primarily governs the maximal attainable structure size. Quantitative thin film interference analysis demonstrates the presence of discrete thickness layers in the film. Controlled evaporation experiments yield homogeneous crystallization patterns across the entire droplet area, facilitating the emergence of ordered photonic structures. Time-series dynamics analysis of height profiles uncovered the spatiotemporal evolution of the crystallization front, providing insights into the details of underlying physical mechanisms. Together, these results establish a robust experimental framework for understanding and predicting crystallization behavior in evaporating droplets, with potential applications in materials synthesis, photonics, and microscale pattern formation.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过多尺度实验，揭示了NaCl液滴在锗基底上蒸发结晶的动力学机制，发现扩散各向异性主导结构尺寸，并建立了统一的结晶形态分类指标（NaCl等效高度），最终实现了有序光子晶体结构的可控形成。
AI.motivation: 液滴蒸发结晶虽能形成复杂自组织结构，但有序功能相（如光子晶体）的涌现机制尚不明确，缺乏统一的定量描述框架来预测和控制结晶行为。
AI.method: 多尺度微观表征（显微成像）、引入NaCl等效高度作为统一指标、定量薄膜干涉分析、受控蒸发实验、时间序列高度剖面动力学分析。
AI.result: 识别出多种微结构（含一维光子晶体）；发现扩散各向异性主导最大结构尺寸而非生长动力学；证实薄膜中存在离散厚度层；受控蒸发实现了整个液滴区域的均匀结晶图案。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个用于理解和预测蒸发液滴结晶行为的实验框架，对材料合成、光子学及微尺度图案形成具有潜在应用价值。

title: Modification of Charge and Spin Textures by Light Chemical Substitution in Eu(Al$_{1-x}$Ga$_{x}$)$_4$ ($x=0.1$)
summary: We present the results of a resonant X-ray diffraction experiment, resolving both charge and spin textures in the intermetallic topological magnet Eu(Al$_{1-x}$Ga$_{x}$)$_4$, $x$ = 0.1. Below $\approx$ 75 K the system develops a charge density wave (CDW) with propagation vector kCDW ~ (0, 0, 0.18). The CDW order parameter grows monotonically on cooling until ~ 15 K, when a sudden decrease in the CDW amplitude occurs. Pairs of magnetic satellites of the (0, 0, 8) Bragg reflection corresponding to two distinct domains, k = ($\pm δ_\text{m}$, 0, 0), k2 = (0, $\pmδ_\text{m}$, 0), $δ_\text{m} = 0.2002(4)$ were studied at the Eu L3 edge, appearing below TN = 14.8 K. Our measurement of TN is exactly coincident with the sudden drop in the CDW amplitude, which suggests strong coupling between the charge and spin orders, as observed in other compounds of the Eu(Al$_{1-x}$Ga$_{x}$)$_4$ series. Azimuthal measurements revealed a single helical spin arrangement with an elliptical envelope of $μ_\text{Y}/μ_\text{Z}$ = 1.19(6) for the k2 domain, and a tilted helical (helicoidal) spin arrangement for the k1 domain, with $μ_\text{Y}/μ_\text{Z}$ = 1.14(4) and $μ_\text{X}/μ_\text{Z}$ = 0.20(2) that may be hidden for the k2 domain due to multiple subdomains. Temperature evolution of the magnetic satellite intensities in linear and circularly polarised light found the respective ratio to be invariant with temperature, suggesting a single magnetic phase below TN. This behaviour is unlike the x = 0 material, in which a spin density wave forms first, transitioning to a helical ground state on cooling through intermediate phases. Future theoretical work on the Eu electronic ground state, supported by related experiments, will help understand the effects of Ga substitution on the evolution of the magnetic structure.

AI.tldr: 本文通过共振X射线衍射实验，研究了拓扑磁体Eu(Al$_{1-x}$Ga$_{x}$)$_4$（$x=0.1$）中的电荷密度波（CDW）与自旋织构。发现CDW序参量在约15 K时突然下降，恰好与磁有序温度（$T_N=14.8$ K）重合，表明电荷与自旋序之间存在强耦合。磁结构包含两种畴：k2畴为单螺旋排列（椭圆包络），k1畴为倾斜螺旋（helicoidal）排列。
AI.motivation: 探索拓扑磁体Eu(Al$_{1-x}$Ga$_{x}$)$_4$体系中电荷与自旋序之间的耦合机制，以及Ga替代对磁结构演化的影响。
AI.method: 使用共振X射线衍射技术，在Eu L3吸收边处测量（0,0,8）布拉格反射的磁卫星，结合线偏振和圆偏振光分析磁畴结构，并通过方位角测量解析自旋排列的几何特征。
AI.result: CDW序参量在冷却过程中单调增长，但在约15 K时突然降低，与磁有序温度精确重合。k2畴呈现单螺旋排列（$μ_Y/μ_Z=1.19(6)$），k1畴呈现倾斜螺旋排列（$μ_Y/μ_Z=1.14(4)$，$μ_X/μ_Z=0.20(2)$）。线偏振与圆偏振光下磁卫星强度比随温度不变，表明单一磁相。
AI.conclusion: CDW与磁有序之间存在强耦合，且该体系在$T_N$以下仅存在单一磁相，与$x=0$材料中先形成自旋密度波再过渡到螺旋基态的多相行为不同。未来需结合实验进行理论计算，以理解Ga替代对Eu电子基态及磁结构演化的影响。

title: RamanGPT: Bidirectional Mapping Between Crystal Structures and Raman Spectra with Graph Neural Networks and Generative Transformers
summary: Raman spectroscopy is one of the most accessible vibrational probes in materials laboratories, but its forward problem (structure to spectrum) is bottlenecked by the cost of density functional perturbation theory, and its inverse problem (spectrum to structure) typically relies on retrieval against curated references. We introduce RamanGPT, a deep-learning framework that addresses both directions for crystalline inorganic materials. The forward model, an Atomistic Line Graph Neural Network (ALIGNN), is trained on the 5{,}099-material Computational Raman Database and predicts 200-bin spectra over 50-1000~cm$^{-1}$ with 42.5\% having a cosine similarity greater than or equal to 0.354 suggesting qualitative features of the target spectrum. The model also shows some qualitative agreement with the approximate features and appearance of similar relative intensity of the modes to an experimental measurement of metallic 1T VSe$_{2}$, a system absent from the training set. The inverse model fine-tunes a large language model via Quantized Low-Rank Adaptation on Raman-plus-formula prompts, recovering lattice parameters with mean absolute errors of 1.14-2.16~Å and reduced-formula consistency of 86.8\% on 508 held-out materials. A cosine-similarity matcher and an inverse$\rightarrow$relax$\rightarrow$forward consistency loop are deployed at https://atomgpt.org/raman.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RamanGPT，一个基于深度学习的框架，同时解决晶体无机材料拉曼光谱的正向问题（结构→光谱）和逆向问题（光谱→结构）。正向模型使用ALIGNN在图谱数据库上训练，逆向模型通过量化低秩适配微调大语言模型。该工作部署在在线平台上。
AI.motivation: 拉曼光谱是材料实验室中重要的振动探测手段，但正向计算（结构→光谱）受限于密度泛函微扰理论的高计算成本，而逆向问题（光谱→结构）通常依赖对 curated 参考谱库的检索，缺乏高效的端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 正向模型：采用ALIGNN（原子线图神经网络）在包含5,099种材料的计算拉曼数据库上训练，预测50-1000 cm⁻¹范围内200个bin的光谱。2) 逆向模型：通过量化低秩适配（QLoRA）微调大语言模型，输入为拉曼光谱加化学式提示，输出晶格参数。3) 部署余弦相似度匹配器和逆向→弛豫→正向一致性循环。
AI.result: 正向模型预测的余弦相似度≥0.354的比例为42.5%，对训练集外材料1T VSe₂的预测与实验谱特征定性一致。逆向模型在508个保留材料上，晶格参数MAE为1.14-2.16 Å，简化化学式一致性达86.8%。
AI.conclusion: RamanGPT展示了深度学习在拉曼光谱双向映射中的潜力，正向模型具备合理的谱图生成能力，逆向模型可从光谱有效推断结构信息。该工作已部署为在线服务，为材料光谱分析提供了新的自动化工具。

title: Fracture energy of 6H-SiC at the microscale: effects of testing geometry and notch preparation
comment: 23 pages, 6 figures, under review by Journal of the European Ceramic Society
summary: Micromechanical testing enables small-scale fracture energy measurements, but values depend strongly on geometry and specimen preparation. Here, the fracture energy of the single-crystal 6H-SiC {10-10} plane was measured using microscale double cantilever beam (DCB) and single cantilever beam (SCB) geometries. DCBs showed stable crack growth under displacement control and obtained 7.5 +- 0.3 J/m2. In contrast, SCBs notched by a Ga focused ion beam gave fracture energies over twice this value, indicating Ga implantation and near-notch residual stresses. Increasing the final notching current increased the measured fracture energy further. Although near-cryogenic notching limited ion-beam-induced damage, it did not reconcile SCB-derived values with DCB test results. Vacuum annealing substantially lowered the fracture energy and brought SCB results into close agreement with DCB measurements, whereas annealing in argon was less effective. Our findings highlight the importance of careful sample preparation and testing geometry selection for reliable fracture property measurement in ceramic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过微尺度双悬臂梁（DCB）和单悬臂梁（SCB）几何测量了单晶6H-SiC {10-10}面的断裂能，发现DCB测得7.5 J/m²，而SCB因镓离子注入和残余应力导致数值翻倍。真空退火可使SCB结果与DCB吻合，强调了样品制备和测试几何选择对陶瓷材料断裂性能测量的重要性。
AI.motivation: 微机械测试使小尺度断裂能测量成为可能，但测量值高度依赖几何形状和样品制备，因此需要研究不同测试几何和制备条件对断裂能测量的影响。
AI.method: 使用微尺度双悬臂梁（DCB）和单悬臂梁（SCB）几何测量单晶6H-SiC {10-10}面的断裂能，并对比不同聚焦离子束（FIB）切割电流、近低温切割、真空退火和氩气退火等处理条件的影响。
AI.result: DCB在位移控制下获得7.5 ± 0.3 J/m²的稳定断裂能；SCB因镓离子注入和残余应力导致断裂能翻倍；增大FIB切割电流进一步增加测量值；真空退火能显著降低SCB断裂能至与DCB一致，而氩气退火效果较差。
AI.conclusion: 样品制备和测试几何选择对陶瓷材料断裂性能的可靠测量至关重要，真空退火可有效消除FIB引入的损伤影响。

title: Topological Weyl Phase of an Ideal Spin-Gapless Semiconductor KCrSe
summary: The coexistence of topological and spin-polarized electronic states within a single material platform provides an attractive route toward emergent quantum phenomena and spintronic functionalities. However, materials simultaneously exhibiting spin-gapless semiconducting (SGS) behavior and Weyl semimetallicity remain exceedingly rare. Here, using first-principles calculations, we identify the half-Heusler compound KCrSe as an ideal spin-gapless Weyl semimetal. Transport calculations reveal a weak temperature dependence of the longitudinal conductivity and relatively small Seebeck coefficients, providing further evidence of its SGS nature. KCrSe hosts a single pair of Weyl nodes-the minimum number permitted in a Weyl semimetal-located in close proximity to the Fermi level (E$_\text{F}$), resulting in exceptionally clean bulk and surface electronic spectra. The nontrivial Berry curvature associated with these Weyl nodes gives rise to sizable anomalous transport responses, including an anomalous Hall conductivity of $σ_{xy}^{A}\sim 90.76~\mathrm{S\,cm^{-1}}$ and an anomalous Nernst conductivity of $α_{xy}^{A}\sim 0.15~\mathrm{A\,m^{-1}K^{-1}}$ at E$_\text{F}$, with substantially enhanced values at lower energies. The combination of an ideal Weyl topology, fully spin-polarized low-energy states, and finite anomalous transport establishes KCrSe as a promising platform for designing high-efficiency topological spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，发现半霍伊斯勒化合物KCrSe是一种理想的spin-gapless Weyl半金属，兼具自旋无隙半导体行为和Weyl半金属特性，表现出优异的拓扑和自旋极化电子态，为设计高效拓扑自旋电子器件提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 寻找同时具备自旋无隙半导体(SGS)行为和Weyl半金属性的材料极为困难，现有材料体系中拓扑态与自旋极化电子态的共存非常罕见，亟需发现新的理想材料平台。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算（first-principles calculations）对半霍伊斯勒化合物KCrSe进行系统研究，并通过输运计算分析其纵向电导率和Seebeck系数。
AI.result: KCrSe拥有单对Weyl节点（Weyl半金属允许的最小数量），且靠近费米能级；在费米能级处反常霍尔电导率约为90.76 S/cm，反常Nernst电导率约为0.15 A/(m·K)，且低能量下数值显著增强。
AI.conclusion: KCrSe结合了理想的Weyl拓扑、完全自旋极化的低能态和有限的反常输运响应，是设计高效拓扑自旋电子器件的 promising 平台。

title: Quantitative Detection of Molecular Oxygen in the Gas Phase with Fluorescent Nanodiamonds
summary: The quantitative detection of paramagnetic molecular oxygen (O2) in gas mixtures using optically detected magnetic resonance (ODMR) from negatively charged nitrogen-vacancy (NV-) centers in fluorescent nanodiamonds is described. Fluorescent nanodiamonds approximately 70 nm in diameter were deposited on the glass surface of a microfluidic channel, and the oxygen concentration varied from 0 to 100% (0 to 760 mmHg O2 partial pressure) by mixing O2 and N2 gases at ambient pressure. Continuous-wave (CW) ODMR contrast was measured using a double-modulation (lock-in) detection scheme applied to both optical excitation and microwave drives. The ODMR contrast decreases linearly with oxygen partial pressure, with a sensitivity coefficient k of (-10.1 +/- 0.3) x 10^-4 % mmHg^-1. The oxygen detection limit of the experimental setup was estimated to be approximately 8 mmHg O2 partial pressure (corresponding to about 1% O2 in the gas mixture). Cycling of the content of O2 in the gas mixture in the range of 0-5% revealed slight hysteresis and corresponding repeatability of 0.006 in percent ODMR contrast. The observed fluorescence quenching and relatively slow response (ranging from several to tens of minutes) upon changes in oxygen concentration suggest that physisorption of gas molecules on the nanodiamond surfaces contributes to equilibration dynamics. The applicability of the nanodiamond-based oxygen quantum sensor was further demonstrated by detecting transient bursts of molecular oxygen generated by enzyme-catalyzed decomposition of hydrogen peroxide.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了利用荧光纳米金刚石中NV-色心的光探测磁共振（ODMR）技术，实现对混合气体中顺磁性分子氧的定量检测。通过双调制锁相检测方案，ODMR对比度随氧分压线性下降，灵敏度系数为(-10.1±0.3)×10⁻⁴% mmHg⁻¹，检测限约8 mmHg（~1% O₂）。研究还展示了该传感器对酶催化分解过氧化氢产生的瞬态氧气的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 开发一种基于纳米金刚石NV-色心的光学量子传感器，实现对气体混合物中分子氧的定量、高灵敏度检测，并展示其在生物催化反应中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 将直径约70 nm的荧光纳米金刚石沉积在微流控通道的玻璃表面，通过混合O₂和N₂改变氧浓度（0-100%）。采用连续波ODMR结合双调制（锁相）检测方案，测量ODMR对比度随氧分压的变化。
AI.result: ODMR对比度与氧分压呈线性关系，灵敏度系数k = (-10.1±0.3)×10⁻⁴ % mmHg⁻¹；检测限约8 mmHg（~1% O₂）；0-5% O₂循环测试中轻微滞后，重复性为0.006；响应时间从数分钟到数十分钟。
AI.conclusion: 纳米金刚石NV-色心ODMR传感器可有效定量检测气相分子氧，氧分子在纳米金刚石表面的物理吸附主导了平衡动力学。该方法可用于检测酶催化反应产生的瞬态氧气，具有生物传感应用潜力。

title: Predicting core-level X-ray photoemission spectra of oxide surfaces from first principles -- a case study for SnO$_2$
summary: X-ray photoemission spectroscopy (XPS) is a powerful technique to gain insight into the chemical properties of oxide surfaces. However, the interpretation of XPS spectra is notoriously difficult as realistic surfaces contain different terminations, reconstructions, adsorbates and defects all of which leave (potentially overlapping) spectroscopic fingerprints. To address this challenge, we present a first-principles approach based on the Z+1 method that allows us to predict XPS spectra of oxide surfaces which can directly be compared to experimental measurements. We present results for different SnO$_2$ (110) surfaces: the stoichiometric surface, surfaces with different types of vacancies (one of which is the fully reduced surface) and also the fully reduced surface with adsorbed OH and O$_2$ molecules. For these systems, we calculate the O 1s core-electron binding energies of all oxygen atoms and then use this to predict the XPS spectrum. We find that the fully reduced surface gives rise to a highly symmetric peak shape in agreement with recent XPS measurements. In contrast, the spectrum of the stoichiometric surface exhibits an additional feature at low binding energies caused by the bridging oxygen atoms at the surface. For the reduced surface with OH and O$_2$ adsorbates, the spectrum exhibits additional features at higher binding energies. The predicted spectra are in good agreement with experimental results obtained for reduced surfaces that have been exposed to oxygen gas. The presented method is general and can be straightforwardly applied to other surfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Z+1方法的第一性原理方法，用于预测氧化物表面的XPS光谱，并以SnO₂(110)表面为例，展示了该方法在化学计量表面、缺陷表面及吸附表面上的应用，预测结果与实验高度一致。
AI.motivation: XPS是研究氧化物表面化学性质的有力工具，但真实表面存在多种终止、重构、吸附物和缺陷，导致光谱解读极其困难。为此，作者希望开发一种可直接与实验对比的理论预测方法。
AI.method: 采用基于Z+1方法的第一性原理计算，预测SnO₂(110)不同表面（化学计量表面、含不同空位的表面、完全还原表面及吸附OH和O₂的完全还原表面）上所有氧原子的O 1s芯电子结合能，进而构建XPS光谱。
AI.result: 完全还原表面呈现高度对称的峰形（与实验一致）；化学计量表面在低结合能处出现额外特征（由表面桥接氧原子引起）；吸附OH和O₂的还原表面在高结合能处出现额外特征。预测光谱与暴露于氧气后的还原表面实验结果吻合良好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有通用性，可推广应用于其他氧化物表面的XPS光谱预测，为复杂表面化学环境的实验数据解读提供可靠的理论支持。

title: Data-driven mapping of borophene growth pathways
summary: Deterministic synthesis of borophene remains challenging because many polymorphs compete during nucleation and growth. Here we combine a reactive machine-learned interatomic potential with grand-canonical Monte Carlo simulations and data-driven structural classification to track borophene formation from early nuclei to extended layers on Ag(111) and Ag(100). We build temperature-pressure substrate growth maps and resolve how vacancy motifs, phase intermixing and seed structure govern polymorph selection. The simulations reproduce key experimental trends, including the prevalence of $β_{12}$/$χ_3$ phases and their temperature-dependent competition, while revealing kinetic pathways that connect metastable nuclei to long-range order. We identify conditions that suppress competing motifs and promote targeted phases, providing actionable synthesis windows. These results establish a predictive framework for directing borophene growth and, more broadly, for controlling polymorphism in low-dimensional materials by coupling atomistic simulation with machine-learning-enabled phase recognition.

AI.tldr: 本研究结合机器学习势函数、巨正则蒙特卡洛模拟和数据驱动的结构分类，追踪了硼烯在Ag(111)和Ag(100)表面的成核与生长过程，构建了温度-压力生长图谱，揭示了空位基序、相混合和种子结构对多晶型选择的影响，并确定了抑制竞争相、促进目标相的可操作合成窗口。
AI.motivation: 硼烯的确定性合成非常困难，因为成核和生长过程中存在许多竞争的多晶型物，因此需要建立预测框架来指导硼烯的生长并控制低维材料中的多晶型现象。
AI.method: 将反应性机器学习原子间势与巨正则蒙特卡洛模拟以及数据驱动的结构分类相结合，追踪硼烯从早期核到扩展层在Ag(111)和Ag(100)上的形成过程，并构建了温度-压力基底生长图谱。
AI.result: 模拟重现了关键实验趋势，包括β₁₂/χ₃相的普遍性及其温度依赖性竞争，揭示了连接亚稳态核与长程有序的动力学路径，并确定了抑制竞争基序和促进目标相的条件。
AI.conclusion: 建立了预测框架来指导硼烯生长，并为通过将原子模拟与机器学习驱动的相识别相结合来控制低维材料中的多晶型现象提供了通用策略。

title: Multiferroicity in the two-dimensional limit in hexagonal LuFeO3 films
summary: Multiferroic oxides, which combine coupled ferroelectric and magnetic orders, are central to understanding correlated quantum phenomena. Yet, as thickness approaches the two-dimensional (2D) limit, both ferroelectricity and magnetism are conventionally expected to vanish due to depolarization fields and finite-size effects, respectively. Here, we demonstrate that hexagonal LuFeO3 (h-LuFeO3) retains coupled ferroelectricity and magnetism at the 2D limit, with a thickness of just one and a half unit cells. Remarkably, the ferroelectric polarization remains comparable to bulk values at room temperature, while long-range magnetism and magnetoelectric coupling persist at low temperatures. We further show that the K3 phonon mode, which mediates the polarization-magnetism coupling, is stable down to the 2D limit. Our results establish h-LuFeO3 as the first oxide system to exhibit genuine 2D-limit multiferroicity, providing a fundamental breakthrough in the long-standing quest to understand and control coupled ferroic orders at the atomic scale.

AI.tldr: 六角LuFeO3在仅1.5个单胞厚度下仍保持耦合的铁电性与磁性，成为首个实现真正二维极限多铁性的氧化物体系。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为，当厚度逼近二维极限时，退极化场会消灭铁电性，有限尺寸效应会消灭磁性。该工作旨在探索是否存在氧化物能在二维极限下同时保留这两种有序性。
AI.method: 制备了厚度仅为1.5个单胞的六角LuFeO3薄膜，通过实验测量其铁电极化、长程磁序和磁电耦合，并分析了K3声子模的稳定性。
AI.result: 室温下铁电极化与块体相当；低温下长程磁序和磁电耦合持续存在；K3声子模在二维极限下保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: h-LuFeO3是首个在二维极限下展现真正多铁性的氧化物体系，为在原子尺度理解和调控耦合铁性序提供了根本性突破。

title: High-Throughput Discovery of Semimetallic Borophenes with Diverse Dirac States Via Transferable Tight-Binding Approach
summary: Borophene has attracted extensive interest due to its structural flexibility and emergent topological electronic states. However, semimetallic borophenes hosting robust Dirac states remain rare among the large number of predicted allotropes. Here, we develop a transferable tight-binding framework for planar borophenes and combine it with a graph- and group-theory-based random generation strategy to perform high-throughput screening of 522 borophene candidates. Eight previously unreported semimetallic borophenes are identified, hosting diverse topological band crossings, including type-I and type-III Dirac cones, Dirac nodal lines, and quadratic nodal points. Notably, quadratic nodal-point semimetals are predicted in borophene for the first time. Symmetry analysis reveals crystalline-symmetry-protected Dirac states, while first-principles calculations confirm their dynamical and thermal stability. These findings establish borophene as a versatile platform for engineering emergent Dirac physics in two dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种可转移的紧束缚框架，结合图论和群论的随机生成策略，对522种硼烯候选结构进行高通量筛选，发现了8种此前未知的半金属硼烯，其中首次预测了二次节点半金属，并验证了其稳定性和拓扑电子态。
AI.motivation: 尽管硼烯具有结构灵活性和拓扑电子态，但拥有稳健狄拉克态的半金属硼烯在所有预测的同素异形体中仍然稀少，因此需要系统地发现新的半金属硼烯。
AI.method: 开发可转移的紧束缚框架，结合图论和群论的随机生成策略，对522种硼烯候选结构进行高通量筛选，并通过对称性分析和第一性原理计算验证稳定性。
AI.result: 发现了8种新的半金属硼烯，具有类型I和III狄拉克锥、狄拉克节线及二次节点，首次在硼烯中预测了二次节点半金属。
AI.conclusion: 该研究确立了硼烯作为二维工程狄拉克物理的多功能平台，展示了其拓扑电子态的丰富多样性。

title: Bernoulli principle in ferroelectrics
summary: Ferroelectric materials, characterized by spontaneous electric polarization, exhibit remarkable parallels with fluid dynamics, where polarization flux behaves similarly to fluid flow. Understanding polarization distribution in confined geometries at the nanoscale is crucial for both fundamental physics and technological applications. Here, we show that the classical Bernoulli principle, which describes the conservation of the energy flux along velocity streamlines in a moving fluid, can be extended to the conservation of polarization flux in ferroelectric nanorods with varying cross-sectional areas. Geometric constrictions lead to an increase in polarization, resembling fluid acceleration in a narrowing pipe, while expansions cause a decrease. Beyond a critical expansion, phase separation occurs, giving rise to topological polarization structures such as polarization bubbles, curls and Hopfions. This effect extends to soft ferroelectrics, including ferroelectric nematic liquid crystals, where polarization flux conservation governs the formation of complex mesoscale states.

AI.tldr: 本文发现铁电材料中的极化通量在变截面纳米棒中遵循类似伯努利原理的守恒规律，几何收缩导致极化增强，扩张导致减弱，过度扩张会引发极化气泡、涡旋和Hopfions等拓扑结构，该效应也适用于铁电向列液晶等软铁电体。
AI.motivation: 理解纳米尺度受限几何中极化分布的规律，对基础物理和技术应用都至关重要。
AI.method: 将流体力学中的伯努利原理（能量通量沿流线守恒）推广到铁电纳米棒中极化通量的守恒，研究变截面对极化分布的影响。
AI.result: 几何收缩导致极化增强（类似流体在窄管中加速），扩张导致极化减弱；超过临界扩张时发生相分离，形成极化气泡、涡旋和Hopfions等拓扑结构；该效应也适用于软铁电体如铁电向列液晶。
AI.conclusion: 建立了铁电系统与流体动力学之间的类比，揭示了受限几何中极化分布的新规律，并预测了复杂拓扑极化结构的形成机制。

title: Geometric Bounds on the Finite-Time Performance of Active Machines
summary: Optimizing energy conversion in active matter remains a central challenge in nonequilibrium physics. Here, we develop a unified thermodynamic framework that characterizes the finite-time performance of interacting active machines. We show that cyclic work admits a geometric decomposition into an antisymmetric thermodynamic curvature, governing work extraction, and a symmetric metric, controlling dissipation. Minimal-dissipation protocols follow geodesics in parameter space, while optimal work extraction deviates from them due to a curvature-induced, Lorentz-like effect. This geometric structure directly determines the finite-time scaling of work and dissipation, enabling a mapping onto Onsager-type quasi-linear current--force relations. We show that both the maximal efficiency and the efficiency at maximum power are governed by an asymmetry parameter and a figure of merit, establishing a formal correspondence between active machines and thermoelectric devices with broken time-reversal symmetry. Our results reveal a fundamental geometric origin of energy-conversion performance and provide a general framework for optimizing active machines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的热力学几何框架，用于描述相互作用活性机器的有限时间性能，揭示了功提取与耗散的几何起源，建立了活性机器与热电装置的正式对应关系。
AI.motivation: 优化活性物质中的能量转换是非平衡物理学的核心挑战，现有理论缺乏统一框架来描述相互作用活性机器的有限时间性能。
AI.method: 开发了一个统一的热力学框架，利用几何方法将循环功分解为反称热力学曲率（控制功提取）和对称度量（控制耗散），并引入准线性电流-力关系。
AI.result: 最小耗散协议遵循参数空间中的测地线；最优功提取由于曲率诱导的类洛伦兹效应而偏离测地线；最大效率及最大功率效率由不对称参数和品质因子决定。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了能量转换性能的几何起源，建立了活性机器与时间反演对称性破缺热电装置的形式对应关系，为优化活性机器提供了通用框架。

title: Tailoring pure valley-Zeeman spin-orbit coupling in WSe$_2$-encapsulated monolayer graphene
summary: Engineering proximity effects in twisted van der Waals heterostructures offers a powerful platform for designing electronic properties. While theoretical predictions of quantum interference in transition metal dichalcogenide-encapsulated graphene can selectively control the spin-orbit coupling component, experimental realizations have remained elusive. Here, we report pure valley-Zeeman spin-orbit coupling in monolayer graphene, achieved by encapsulation between two parallel twisted WSe$_2$ monolayers. We observed a symmetry-enforced reordering of Landau levels, which is driven by the competition between the fixed valley-Zeeman energy and the magnetic-field-dependent cyclotron energy. This reordering is characterized by a transition from symmetry-broken states in the quantum Hall effect to a restored fourfold degeneracy with integer or half-integer quantum Hall sequences. We also demonstrate the ability to completely quench the proximity spin-orbit coupling by tuning the encapsulated geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在双层扭转WSe₂之间封装单层石墨烯，实现了纯谷-塞曼自旋轨道耦合，并观察到由固定谷-塞曼能与磁场依赖的回旋能竞争导致的朗道能级重排，以及通过调控封装几何结构完全抑制邻近自旋轨道耦合的能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管理论上预测过渡金属硫族化合物封装的石墨烯中量子干涉可选择性控制自旋轨道耦合分量，但实验实现一直难以达成。
AI.method: 在两个平行扭转的WSe₂单层之间封装单层石墨烯，通过对称性工程调控邻近自旋轨道耦合效应。
AI.result: 观察到纯谷-塞曼自旋轨道耦合，以及对称性强制的朗道能级重排——表现为从对称性破缺的量子霍尔态转变为具有整数或半整数量子霍尔序列的四重简并态；同时实现了通过调控封装几何结构完全抑制邻近自旋轨道耦合。
AI.conclusion: 成功在实验上实现了纯谷-塞曼自旋轨道耦合，为通过扭转异质结工程设计电子性质提供了新的平台和调控手段。

title: Magneto-optical evidence for single-crystal-like magnetic switching of epitaxial antiferromagnetic LaFeO3 films
summary: Strained epitaxial films of the antiferromagnetic orthoferrite LaFeO3 offer a promising platform for antiferromagnetic spintronics, yet their magnetic switching behavior and domain structure have remained largely unexplored due to the small magnitude of the weak ferromagnetic moment. Here, we demonstrate that longitudinal magneto-optical Kerr effect (MOKE) measurements provide a sensitive and direct probe of magnetic switching and domain processes in coherently strained LaFeO3 thin films grown on orthorhombic substrates. By employing DyScO3(110), GdScO3(110), and NdGaO3(110) substrates, we achieve straincontrolled, largely twin-free growth and identify the orientation of the orthorhombic c-axis through the presence or absence of a longitudinal MOKE signal. Compressively strained films exhibit large Kerr signals, rectangular hysteresis loops, and magnetic single-domain remanence over macroscopic areas. Tensile strain on orthorhombic substrates is associated with two competing structural effects on thin film orientation; in-plane magnetization has been identified in some films on GdScO3(110) by MOKE. Angle-dependent MOKE hysteresis follows the Kondorsky model, indicating domain-wall-controlled switching analogous to bulk single crystals. Kerr microscopy reveals abrupt domain nucleation and rapid domain-wall motion, with defects acting as pinning centers and governing the coercive field. Our results establish MOKE as an efficient optical tool for identifying orthorhombic orientation, probing magnetic switching of coupled weak magnetization and Neel vectors, and accessing domain dynamics in LaFeO3 films. This provides a foundation for strain-engineered orthoferrite thin films in antiferromagnetic spintronics and magnonics.

AI.tldr: 本文利用纵向磁光克尔效应(MOKE)实现了对应变LaFeO3反铁磁薄膜磁化翻转和畴结构的灵敏探测，通过不同正交衬底实现应变控制生长，揭示了压缩应变下的大克尔信号、矩形磁滞回线和单畴剩磁，以及拉伸应变下的面内磁化行为，建立了MOKE作为表征正交铁氧体薄膜磁性与畴动力学的有效光学工具，为反铁磁自旋电子学提供了基础。
AI.motivation: 尽管应变LaFeO3外延薄膜是反铁磁自旋电子学的有前景平台，但由于弱铁磁矩极小，其磁化翻转行为和畴结构尚未被充分探索。本文旨在利用MOKE实现对这类薄膜磁性的灵敏探测。
AI.method: 采用纵向磁光克尔效应(MOKE)测量，在DyScO3(110)、GdScO3(110)和NdGaO3(110)等正交衬底上生长LaFeO3薄膜，通过应变控制实现无孪晶生长；结合角分辨MOKE磁滞回线（Kondorsky模型）和克尔显微镜进行系统表征。
AI.result: 压缩应变薄膜表现出大克尔信号、矩形磁滞回线和宏观区域的磁单畴剩磁；拉伸应变下薄膜出现两种竞争的结构取向效应，部分GdScO3衬底上的薄膜识别出面内磁化；MOKE磁滞回线符合Kondorsky模型，表明畴壁控制翻转；克尔显微镜观察到突然的畴成核和快速畴壁运动，缺陷充当钉扎中心控制矫顽场。
AI.conclusion: MOKE被证明是一种高效光学工具，可用于识别正交晶向、探测弱磁化和Néel矢量的磁化翻转、以及研究LaFeO3薄膜的畴动力学，为反铁磁自旋电子学和磁振子学中应变工程的铁氧体薄膜奠定了基础。

title: Predicting the conditions for observing the Mpemba effect
summary: The Mpemba effect, a counterintuitive phenomenon where a hotter system relaxes faster than a colder one, has been widely observed in various nonequilibrium systems. Despite this progress, the fundamental structural features of the energy landscape required for its emergence remain a subject of debate. In this study, we investigate the conditions for the Mpemba effect within one-dimensional overdamped Langevin dynamics. We classify the potential landscapes based on the presence of single or double wells, their symmetry properties, and the existence of walls. We establish that the existence of the effect is primarily driven by the presence of boundaries, either hard or soft, rather than the specific internal structure of the potential landscape, such as metastability or the number of minima. By employing a spectral decomposition of the Fokker-Planck operator, we analyze the behavior of the first nontrivial eigenmode and demonstrate that its derivative acts as a Dirac delta peak in the low-temperature regime. This helps us elucidate the mechanism underlying the Mpemba effect: it appears as the interplay between this behavior and the initial population dynamics in a non-trivial way induced by the presence of the wall. Our analysis provides a unified classification across single- and double-well potentials, highlighting the crucial role of boundary conditions and asymmetry. Furthermore, we demonstrate that this framework allows for the engineering of potential landscapes capable of producing multistage Mpemba transitions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一维过阻尼朗之万动力学中Mpemba效应的条件，发现势能景观的边界（硬边界或软边界）是驱动该效应的主要因素，而非亚稳态或极小值数量等内部结构。通过Fokker-Planck算子的谱分解，揭示了边界条件下本征模的行为机制，并提出可工程化设计多阶段Mpemba转变的势能景观。
AI.motivation: 尽管Mpemba效应（较热系统比较冷系统冷却更快）已在多种非平衡系统中被广泛观测，但其所需的能量景观基本结构特征仍存在争议。本文旨在厘清该效应产生的根本条件。
AI.method: 基于一维过阻尼朗之万动力学，对势能景观按单/双阱、对称性及壁的存在性进行分类；采用Fokker-Planck算子的谱分解，分析首个非平凡本征模的行为，特别是低温区域其导数表现为狄拉克δ峰的特性。
AI.result: 发现Mpemba效应的主要驱动力是边界（硬边界或软边界）的存在，而非势能景观的内部结构（如亚稳态或极小值数量）。该效应源于边界诱导的本征模行为与初始种群动力学之间的复杂相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 建立了跨单阱和双阱势的统一分类框架，强调了边界条件和不对称性的关键作用；同时证明该框架可用于工程化设计能产生多阶段Mpemba转变的势能景观。

title: Constraint-Enhanced Physical Search through Correlation Matching
summary: Physical systems do not merely add noise to search processes; they impose constraints that generate structured correlations. We propose a principle of constraint-enhanced physical search in which temporal correlations in exploration are matched to constraint-induced spatial correlations in the update dynamics. Using a minimal tug-of-war bandit model (TOW), we show that a conservation law converts local observations into differential evidence across alternatives, while a temporally correlated drive controls the order of exploration. Search efficiency is improved not by stronger randomness or by maximal anti-correlation, but by matching the temporal correlation to the physical update scale that converts feedback into evidence. A scaling estimate identifies the update-noise-to-contrast ratio as the leading parameter that limits how strongly temporal anti-correlation can be used. The results suggest a general organizing principle for physical search: constraints and fluctuations can generate structured spatiotemporal correlations, and efficient exploration emerges when these correlations are matched to the update dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“约束增强物理搜索”原则，通过一种最小化拔河博弈模型（TOW）证明，将时间相关性探索与约束诱导的空间相关性更新动态匹配，能提高搜索效率，而非依赖更强的随机性或最大反相关性。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为物理系统仅给搜索过程添加噪声，但作者认为物理约束会产生结构化相关性，探索者可以利用这些相关性来提高搜索效率。
AI.method: 使用最小化拔河博弈模型（TOW），通过守恒律将局部观测转化为选项间的差分证据，利用时间相关驱动力控制探索顺序。
AI.result: 搜索效率提升的关键在于将时间相关性与物理更新尺度匹配，更新-噪声对比率是限制时间反相关性使用程度的主导参数。
AI.conclusion: 约束与波动可生成结构化的时空相关性，当这些相关性与更新动态匹配时，即可实现高效探索——这是一个通用组织原则。

title: Chirality-resolved spectroscopy of Caroli-de Gennes-Matricon states in multiband FeTe$_{1-x}$Se$_{x}$ superconductors
summary: We employ terahertz Faraday magneto-optical spectroscopy to probe the relaxation dynamics of quantized helical Caroli-de Gennes-Matricon (CdGM) states in epitaxial FeTe$_{1-x}$Se$_x$ thin films, nodeless multiband superconductors with short coherence lengths in the moderately clean limit. By exploiting polarization-selective optical transitions, we directly resolve the helicity and band origin of vortex-core quasiparticles. We observe long-lived CdGM resonances with opposite circular polarizations for electron- and hole-like bands. This enables independent, band-resolved determination of quasiparticle lifetimes, vortex masses, coherence lengths, and upper critical fields, and reveals their systematic evolution with isovalent substitution. The results establish terahertz magneto-optics as a direct probe of helical vortex-core excitations and provide dynamical evidence for multiband CdGM states in iron-based superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文利用太赫兹法拉第磁光光谱技术，直接探测了FeTe$_{1-x}$Se$_x$外延薄膜中量子化螺旋Caroli-de Gennes-Matricon（CdGM）态的弛豫动力学，并通过偏振选择性光学跃迁解析了涡旋核心准粒子的手性和能带起源，观察到电子型和空穴型能带中长寿命的CdGM共振具有相反的圆偏振特性，从而实现了能带分辨的准粒子寿命、涡旋质量、相干长度和上临界场的独立测定，揭示了它们随同价取代的系统演化规律。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对铁基超导体中多能带CdGM态的实验探测尚不充分，尤其缺乏直接解析涡旋核心激发态手性和能带起源的动态证据。
AI.method: 采用太赫兹法拉第磁光光谱技术，利用偏振选择性光学跃迁，对FeTe$_{1-x}$Se$_x$外延薄膜中的CdGM态进行能带分辨的谱学测量。
AI.result: 观测到电子型和空穴型能带中长寿命、相反圆偏振的CdGM共振，实现了准粒子寿命、涡旋质量、相干长度和上临界场的能带分辨测定，并揭示了这些参数随Se取代的系统演化规律。
AI.conclusion: 太赫兹磁光光谱可作为探测螺旋涡旋核心激发的直接手段，并为铁基超导体中多能带CdGM态的存在提供了动态实验证据。

title: Demonstrating magnetic memory in iron-rhodium structures using a quantum diamond microscope
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, to be submitted to Nature Materials
summary: Iron-rhodium (FeRh) has a first-order phase transition near room temperature between antiferromagnetic (AFM) and ferromagnetic (FM) phases, making it a promising material for magnetic memory technologies like heat-assisted magnetic recording (HAMR). It has a comparatively sharper phase transition and lower writing temperature than alternative materials, implying less thermal engineering constraints and an increase in write/read head lifetime. Despite great effort, however, AFM-based magnetic memory using FeRh has not yet been realized. Here, we employ both wide-field and scanning nanoscale quantum diamond microscopes (QDMs) to image directly the magnetic field of a patterned FeRh thin film structure under ambient conditions, demonstrating a magnetic recording technique that is reliable and robust. We experimentally identify coupling between the Néel and magnetization vector directions; and also, that the magnetic orientation of the FM phase uniquely determines the Néel vector in the AFM phase, due to pinned uncompensated magnetic moments (UMMs) in the FeRh structure. Thus, the magnetic orientation is maintained when the system is cycled between AFM and FM phases, providing the foundation for a practical, AFM-based magnetic memory.

AI.tldr: 本文利用纳米量子金刚石显微镜直接成像图案化FeRh薄膜的磁场，证实了FeRh中反铁磁与铁磁相之间的磁取向耦合机制，为基于反铁磁的磁存储技术奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 尽管FeRh具有优异的一阶相变特性（近室温、锐利相变、低写入温度），但基于反铁磁的磁存储尚未实现，亟需理解其磁取向机制以实现可靠存储。
AI.method: 采用宽场和扫描纳米量子金刚石显微镜（QDM），在环境条件下直接成像图案化FeRh薄膜结构的磁场，实验研究相变过程中的磁取向耦合。
AI.result: 实验发现Néel矢量与磁化矢量方向之间存在耦合；铁磁相的磁取向唯一确定了反铁磁相的Néel矢量，这是由于FeRh结构中未补偿磁矩（UMMs）的钉扎效应。
AI.conclusion: 磁取向在AFM与FM相循环过程中得以保持，为开发实用的反铁磁基磁存储技术提供了关键实验基础。
